Mube mupepi fye,
    E lyo nshakalewa;
Munjikatishe, mungafwe
    Ukulwa no kwansha.

Nga nkaleko mweo,
    Nkapula mu kati,
Pa kufwa nkafuma mu mfwa,
    ‘Mweo nayasanga.
Lyene nkeshibisha,
    Yangwe! Fyo natemwa
‘Kusose shiwi ili pe:
    “Pe fye kuli Lesa!”

‘Penga lya kwa Lesa,
    ‘Shiwi limo line;
Likomfwikwa na mu nshinshi,
    “Pe fye kuli Lesa!”
Lishiwi lya kwima,
    ‘Kupundo bwanshisho;
Kabili, “Pe fye kuli Lesa!”
    Amen, ifyo fine.

songs.title: LULEPWO LWENDO LWANDI,
songs.title2: THE SANDS OF TIME ARE SINKING
songs.content:
Lulepwo lwendo lwandi,
   Kuleca ku mulu;
Nafwaisha kasua
   Akabuta tutu.
‘Bushiku bwafitishe,
   Lwaiso lucelo,
No kucindama kwaba
   Kulya kwi sano.

Kristu cishima cine
   Ca luse lwacisha;
Amenshi nanwa pa nshi,
   Ku mulu nkanwisha;
‘Mimana ya cikuku
   Yakula ku mulu,
No kucindama kwaba
   Kulya ku Mfumu.

Naba ne wa kwa Kristu,
   Na Kristu, e wandi;
Ampoka ne mubembu,
   E kushuka kwandi.
Ni Kristu ncetekela,
   Wa luse lwacila,
Na ku bukata bwine
   Kulya kwashila.

Nge fyo nabwinga ‘lumba
   Shibwinga wakwe fye,
Ndelosha menso yandi
   Kuli Kristu mwine;
Te ku cilambu cakwe,
   Kano ku filso;
E Mfumu yacindama,
   Kulya ku mulu.

Mu lwendo lwandi lonse
   Anyensha na mano;
Mu kati ka bucushi
   Mwaba no butemwo.
Nkapale Ntungulushi,
   Nkatotela Kristu,
Ukwacindame cibi,
   Kulya ku Mfumu.

Nalipamine nshila,
   No mwela ne mfula;
Nomba ndi ngo mulendo
   Na maka yacepa.
‘Kasuba nomba kawa,
   Lulepwo lwendo lu;
Ndecelelo bukata
   Kulya ku mulu.

songs.title: SHABIKILWE PA MFUMU
songs.title2: I LAY MY SINS ON JESUS
songs.content:
Shabikilwe pa Mfumu
‘Mpulumushi shandi,
Yalisendele shonse,
Yankakwile cine;
Naisa kuli Yesu
‘Kuti ansambemo
‘Kubuta ku mulopa,
Kwishala na kamo.

Naleta kuli Yesu
Ifintu nabulwa;
Amposha ku malwele,
‘Mutima aposha.
Nabika pali Yesu
‘Bulanda ninkwata;
Awe nintula fyonse,
Wene e wapoka.

Watusha pali Yesu
Umutima wandi;
Wene amfukatila,
Nasekele cibi,
Natemwa shina lyakwe,
Imanyule Kristu,
Nge cena cawamisha
Lyafika ku bantu.

Kampalane na Yesu,
Mususma, mufuke,
‘Kuti mbe ifyo aba,
‘Mwana wa kwa Wishi.
Nafuluka kwa Yesu,
Ku mulu ku mwakwe,
Ukwimba malumbanyo
Pamo na bakwe pe.

songs.title: ‘KACELO PE LUSE LUPYA
songs.content:
‘Kacelo pe luse lupya
Lutushibusha, lutwimya,
Lutupususha mu mfifi,
Lutubwekesha ku bumi.

Uluse lupye nshiku pe
Luba mupepi na ifwe;
Lututula, lutwelela,
Lufundishe fya kwa Lesa.

Imilimo ya fye yonse
Yatupele co twafwaya.
‘Kuti twikanye fyabipa,
Tupalame kuli Lesa.

‘Mulandu wa luse lwenu,
Mutufishe kuli imwe,
Mutwafwe ‘kuti twikale
Mu luse lwenu ‘nshiku pe.

songs.title: WE MUTIMA, SHI SHIBUKA,
songs.content:
We mutima, shi shibuka,
Sh’enda pamo na kasuba;
Ima ne nseko no kuya
Ku kwimba no kutotela.

Shibuka no kusansula
Kumo na bamlaika;
Benyo kwimba tabanaka,
Inyimbo sha kuli Lesa.

Nalumbanya, mwe bandama
Mu tulo ilyo ndetusha.
Lyene mu mfwa nga nabuka,
E mweo wa ciyayaya.

Mwe Mfumu, nomba nalomba
Mufulunganye fyabipa.
Mungafwe, ‘matontonkanyo
Yabe kuli imwe lelo.

Muntungulule, mumfunde,
‘Misosele, ‘micitile,
Na maka yandi yonse fye
Numbanyo luse lwenu pe.

Kuli Lesa tuletota,
Ifintu fyonse atupa;
Toteni bonse mu mulu,
Wishi, Mwana, no Mupashi.

songs.title: NI ‘MWE LUBUTO KU CALO CONSE,
songs.content:
Ni ‘mwe Lubuto ku calo conse,
   Butusheni;
Ni ‘mwe Lutanda lwa pa Kacelo,
   Cinsakambwe.
Mwati: “Cebenya menso ku mulu,
Mulemono lulumbi lwa uko.”

Limbi, kale twapumbile nshila
   Ya ku myesu:
‘Makasa yesu na menso pamo
   Fyali fya fye.
Mwatulililyo bulanda ni ‘mwe,
No kutukumya bonse pa menso.

Ni Aleluya e lo natwimbe
   Muno nshila;
‘Kutemwa kwenu e kutusunga,
   Fwe bafilwa.
Twamulumbanya mwe batuwamya,
Tuletota, twacitilwe fingi.

We mfwa nobe, ‘bulamba buli pi,
   No lubola?
Nombe Mfumu yafumye cifimbo,
   Calepulwa.
Ni ‘mwe Lubuto, mwe baletwita
Ku luse lwenu lwa munshipela.

songs.title: MWE MFUMU, E CAWAMISHA,
songs.title2: O LORD IT IS A BLESSED THING
songs.content:
Mwe Mfumu, e cawamisha,
Bwaca no bwailo kwisa
Kuli imwe no kupepa.

Kuno kuli fye tondolo,
Tatulatendeka ncito,
Twalombe lelo bupalo.

Nga bwaila inshiku pe,
Twisafukama kuli ‘mwe,
Ukuti tumutotele.

Mubyo lubutwa kacelo,
Na lyonse tuli mu lwendo,
Tulwishe fibi mwi pepo.

Nge ncito yapwe cungulo,
Twaisayebelako,
Kabinge mubyo lubuto.

Ni mwe Lubuto lwa calo,
Tutungululwe na pano,
‘Kacelo pe ne cungulo.

songs.title: ‘LINTU BUSHIKU BUCA,
songs.content:
‘Lintu bushiku buca,
‘Mutima ulatila:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!
Mwi pepo ne ncito
Kwa Yesu ndayako
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!

‘Lintu nsenauka fye,
No tulo nshimona,
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!
‘Matontonkanyo yabi
Nakulakanya ne ci:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!

Nga ndi no bulanda,
‘Mutima ndateka,
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!
Nga fino ndi mupina
Kansose mu mutima:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!

Mu mulu mwa Lesa
‘Bangeli basosa:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!
Pamo na bantu pa nshi
Balemba na mashiwi:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!

E lyo no lwimbo lu
Ndeimbila Yesu:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!
No mu myaka yonse:
   Yeswa lumbaniwe!

songs.title: WE BUSHIKU BWA KUTUSHA,
songs.content:
We bushiku bwa kutusha,
    ‘Bwabulwe milimo,
We bushiku bundetela
    ‘Fya buseko.

Ukutalala shilili
    Kuli lonse konse,
Kwaimyo mutima wandi
    Kuli imwe.

Takuli ciunda, ‘cingo,
    Pantwi ncito yapwa;
Takuli mashiwi, kano
    Aya kwimba.

‘Fya pano nse filoluka,
    Mpalamyo ko muli;
Na ifwe twaesho kwimba
    Nga bangeli.

Abo abemba pano nse
    ‘Kulumbanya kwabo;
Nge nyimbo sha pano shapwa,
    Bakembo ko.

Mwe Lesa ni mwe mwatupa
    Ubushiku ubu;
Ca kusonda ubutusho
    Bwa mu mulu.

songs.title: ‘BUSHIKU BWA KWA LESA
songs.title2: THE DAWN OF GOD'S DEAR SABBATH
songs.content:
‘Bushiku bwa kwa Lesa
   Bucele mu calo,
Buli ngo bwa kundapa
   Ku bufufyo tulo.
Buleisa nge mfula
   ‘Kupwisho lusuba,
Pamo nge cintelelwe
   Kuntu kabalike.

Ilelo ubulanda
   Bwasanguke nseko;
Kabinge ukweshiwa
   Kwaba e bupalo;
Insala e kwikuta
   ‘Kunaka butusho,
‘Kulwala e kwikala
   Muli Yesu Kristu.

Mwe Mfumu, ‘fwe twaleta
   Ubupe kuli mwe
Bwa nshiku sha milimo
   Ya mpomfu, ya cine;
‘Fisabo fya kwikanya,
   Fya luse kuli mwe,
‘Fyasabwa mu mitima;
   ‘Fwe twaleto bupe.

Kabinge fwe twaleta
   ‘Cisendo ca bubi,
Tulemufukamina
   ‘Kuti mutwelele;
‘Bulanda bwa mitima,
   Bwa milimo yonse
Intu tushicitile,
   Intu mwatupele.

Ni ‘fyo fine, mwe Mfumu,
   Twakulafwaya pe
Mu cinso ca kwa Yesu
   ‘Kuti tulumbanye.
Pa bushiku bwe lelo,
   Na mu nganda yenu.
‘Kutota kwa mushilo
   Pe fye kube kwesu.

E lyo nga no buseko
   Ku mwesu twafika,
‘Bulanda ne cikonko
   Ne fibi fikapwa.
Ne lintu abangeli
   Nabatulonganya,
Mwe Lesa, Mupusushi,
   Shikulu, twatota.

songs.title: ‘BUSHIKU BWA KUTASHA,
songs.title2: O DAY OF REST AND GLADNESS
songs.content:
‘Bushiku bwa kutasha,
   Bwa lubuto, ‘nseko :
Bwapwisha fye citendwe,
   Bwayemba, tondolo.
Bwaba kafukauka
   Ka mu ciswebebe;
Ilelo tulemona
   Ifikesabapo.

Pali buno, ‘lubuto
   Lwacitilwe kale;
Pali buno, Shikulu
   Aiminyo Mumi;
Pali buno pe Paska
   ‘Mupashi apelwe;
‘Lubuto lwa patatu
   Mulyu bo lwabwela.

Ilelo pa mikowa
   ‘Fya mulu fyaisa;
Twaiso kulongana,
   Ingoma yatwita;
Kunwe landwe lyasoswa,
   Lyakulayanana,
Nga menshi yalengama
   Lyatukoselesha.

Icikuku na cimbi
   Ilelo twasanga;
Tukasukya tufika
   Ku butusho bwine.
Ku Mupashi Wabuta,
   Na Shifwe no Mwana,
Abenu baletota,
   Bakulalumbanya.

songs.title: LESA WANDI NATOTELA,
songs.content:
Lesa wandi natotela,
‘Mapalo yonse napelwa.
Munteke bwino bushiku,
Ntushe mu kuboko kwenu.

Munjelele Mfumu yandi,
Fyonse fyabipa nincita
Ku ba mu calo na imwe;
Pa kulala mbyo mutende.

Tulumbanye Lesa wesu,
E mutule palo lyesu.
‘Ba mu calo, ‘ba mu mulu,
Lumbeni Lesa patatu.

songs.title: MUTUPALE MUPUSUSHI,
songs.content:
Mutupale Mupusushi,
   Tucili tulelols;
Natwiso kuyase fibi,
   Ni ‘mwe mwingatwelela.

Nangula ubonaushi
   Mupepi bwatushinsha,
Mwatucingilila ni ‘mwe,
   Nga mulipo twatulwa.

Nangwi mfifi yafitisha,
   Mfifi te ‘ti ‘tufise;
Imwe pe fye tamulala,
   Musunga,mutulinda.

‘Mfwa nga iletuponena
   Apo tulesendama,
Ulucelo tushibuke
   No kwikala na imwe.

songs.title: LINTWI NCITO NAIPWA,
songs.content:
Lintwi ncito naipwa,
‘Lwendo na lo nalupwa,
Peleni uwanaka
     ‘Butusho bwa pe.

‘Lintu kulwishe fibi
Kwapwa, e na balwani
Bafwa, lyene peleni
     ‘Mutende wa pe.

‘Lintwi mfifi yapita,
Pa kuca twasekela,
Twatote co mwatupa
     ‘Lubuto lwa pe.

Umutima wacula,
Limbi fyonse fikapwa;
Mutufisho ko bwaba
     Buseko bwa pe.

Nga twafuluke nshiku
Ishapitile kale,
Mutupele ku mulu
     ‘Kutemwa kwa pe.

‘Lintu twaleko mweo,
Mu nshishi twashikwamo;
Mutupele citebo
     Ca mweo wa pe.

songs.title: MWE KATULA MUTUPALE
songs.content:
Mwe katula mutupale
    Ilyo tatulalekana;
‘Mitima yesu ikabe
    No kutemwa no kwitaba.

    Mu mfifi ya mfwa, mu mweo,
    Mwe Yesu mubyo lubuto.

Nomba bwaila, nakawa,
    Mwamona fyonse twacita;
Ifisuma ne fyabipa,
    Ukwima nangu ukuwa.

Mwe Mfumu mutukakule
    Mu fikakilo fya fibi;
Na mapalo muyafushe,
    Tusambwe, tubyo mutende.

Na cimbi mutwelelepo,
    Tumutine, tumutemwe,
Mulundepo no buseko,
    Twesho kumupalanya pe.

Bonse twatemwa, ‘bapina
    Na babi, twabapepela;
Muli ‘mwe twasansamuka,
    Mwe Yesu ni ‘mwe Katula.

songs.title: NI ‘MWE KASUBA KA MWEO,
songs.content:
Ni ‘mwe Kasuba ka mweo,
Te bushiku nga mulipo;
Ikumbi limo liisa
Ku menso ku kumufisa.

‘Lintu ndelele mu tulo,
No kushibata amenso,
Amatontonkanyo yabe
Ya kuli ‘mwe, Mupusushi.

Mube na ine ‘kacelo,
Te ‘ti njikale neka ‘yo;
Mube na ine ‘bwaila,
Te ‘ti mfwe kano mulipo.

Nga umo wa bana benu,
Naulungana ilelo,
Mwe Mfumu mubombe nomba
‘Kuti mu fibi elala.

 Abalwele mubalinde,
Na bapina mubapale;
‘Ba kulosho bushiku bu
 Balale bwino mu tulo.

Mukatupalya kacelo,
Tatulaenda mu calo,
Tukasuke tukafike
Ku mulu, mu luse lwenu.

songs.title: ‘KASUBA MWATUPA NAKAWA,
songs.content:
‘Kasuba mwatupa nakawa,
    Mwaebe mfifi ipone;
‘Kacelo twacimulumbanya,
    Ne cungulo ni ‘fyo fine.

Tulemutotelo mulandu
    ‘Cilomganino cenu pe
Tacisendama na mu tulo,
    Kano kulola pano nse.

Mu fyalo, e na mu filila,
    ‘Bushiku bucele bwino;
‘Shiwi lye pepo talileka,
    Nelyo ishiwi lya nyimbo.

‘Kasuba ‘katuwila kuno
    Kalashibusha banensu;
E balepokelelo lwimbo
    ‘Kutasha Lesa Mukulu.

Ifyo fine; ‘cipuna cenu
    Te kuti cifumepo pe;
‘Bufumu bulebelelela,
    Bakasuke bamuwile.

songs.title: MUBE NA INE, LESA WANDI PE,
songs.content:
Mube na ine, Lesa wandi pe,
‘Mfifi ilipo, mube na ine.
Pantu ‘mbi wa kungafwa nshikwete,
Mwe Kafwa wandi, mube na ine.

‘Nshiku shesu shilepita bwangu,
Ifya kuno tafibelelela;
Ifya calo fya kwaluka fyonse,
Mwe bashaluka mube na ine.

Te kwisa nge mfumu ya shamfumu,
Mu bukali no kutinya bantu;
Lelo mwise mu lusho, mutende,
Mwe Kafwa wandi mube na ine.

Ndamukabila umo shacela,
Mumpya maka ya kwansha Katunka;
‘Ba kuntungulula mweka ni mwe,
Monsho mom pita mube na ine.

Nga muli mupepi nshiletina,
Mu bulanda mulensansamusha;
‘Mfwa ne cilindi te kuti ntine,
Ngansha fyonse nga muli na ine.

Monyo lupanda nga nashibata,
Mu mfifi mukamengeshimina,
‘Bushiku bwaca mu mulu, lyene
Mu mweo, mu mfwa, mube na ine.

songs.title: MWE MFUMU, NO MUTIMA UMO FYE,
songs.content:
Mwe Mfumu, no mutima umo fye,
Nomba twaimbile shina lyenu;
Twaima, twatota, twalekako,
Tulefukama, mutupaleko.

Penyu mutende mu nshila shesu;
‘Lwendo lwesu lukapwa ku mulu.
Sungeni milomo ne mitima
lyamupepa muno mu nganda.

Penyu mutende ubushiku bu,
‘Mfifi isanguke ulubuto;
Mubakya bana benu ku fibi.
‘Mfifi, ‘lubuto, cimo kuli ‘mwe.

Penyu mutende nshiku shonse pe,
’Ba kututeka, bakafwa ni mwe.
’Lintu tuketwo kuya ku mulu.
Tuketaba no kwanga, mwe Mfumu.

songs.title: ‘BUSHIKU BU BWAILA,
songs.content:
‘Bushiku bu bwaila,
    Natota mwe Mfumu;
Nalombo kuti fibi
    Fiisa bushiku.

         Mundame bwino, mwe
         Mfumu, No kumbaka ubushiku.

‘Nseko she lelo shapwa,
    Napepa kuli ‘mwe,
Nalomba nibipilwa
    ‘Nshita ya bushiku.

‘Milimo yapwe lelo.
    Ndeimbo lwimbo lu,
Nati mwileka mwenso
    Wise ubushiku.

Kabaka wandi ni ‘mwe,
    Pantu mwaishiba
Ifibi fyabe fingi
    Umo nyendaenda.

         Mwe Mfumu Yesu, mung'ufwe,
         Mumbake pe, mumpusushe.

songs.title: SHIFWE WA MU MULU WINE,
songs.content:
Shifwe wa mu mulu wine,
‘Nyimbo shesu sha cungulo
   Shilelumbulo luse.
Mwatusunga akasuba,
Mwacilatutungulula,
   Pantu muli ba luse.

‘Fibi fyonse ifye lelo
Fya mitima na maboko,
   Mutwelele fyonse fi.
Ku calo na ku mubili
‘Nshiku shonse tupusuke,
   Katula wa Kalbale.

Ku matunko ya kwa Ciwa
Ne mipashi iyabipa,
   Mube Umupusushi.
Ubushiku mutubake,
No mutende ube ne few
   Tucili pa masanshi.

Nombo bushiku bwaila,
Mwe Katula mutukoshe
   No bupalo bwenu fye.
Mu mfifi na mu busanso,
Tumfwe ifyo muli pano,
   Mupusushi wa luse.

songs.title: AKASUBA KAWA,
songs.content:
Akasuba kawa,
   Nomba bwaila;
‘Milimo naipwa,
   ‘Bantu batusha.

Nomba kuli mfifi,
   ‘Ntanda shabeka,
Inama ne fyuni
   Filesendama.

‘Banka bapelwo,
   Tulo tusuma;
No bupalo bwenu
   Tuleshibata.

Mupele abana
   Bamone imwe;
Mutule bacoba
   Ba pa cambeshi.

Musungya balwele
   Abakalipwa;
Abacite fibi
   Muebelela.

Ubushiku buno
   ‘Bangeli bene
Batubake bwino,
   E batulinde.

Ngo bushiku bwaca
   Mukanyimye mwe,
Ukwabule fibi,
   Nyende na imwe.

Tulumbanye Lesa,
   Wishi na Mwane,
Mupashi Wabuta.
   ‘Nshiku shonse pe.

songs.title: BACIBA NABALONGANA,
songs.content:
Baciba nabalongana,
    ‘Bengi bacimupakata,
‘Mpumi bacishikimika,
    Kuli imwe bacipepa.

Ilyo bushiku bucele
    Pa milundu na mabemba,
Bamwano bacishibuka,
    Ku kusungo bushiku bu.

‘Kabanga na ku masamba,
    ‘Kapinda e na ku maca,
Abantu bacimuwila.
    Baima, bamulumbanya.

Ifilamba na mapepo
    Fyonse nafyumfwika lelo;
Na ‘basangwa no bucushi
    Tabamukutilya pa fye.

Baipakisha bapina,
    Abelelwa basekela;
Basansamuka ‘balosha,
    ‘Babuta bamona Lesa.

Ipepo limo lyashala,
    Lya pano nse, lya mu mulu;
Mupwishe fyo mwalaile,
    Benike Yesu, “Shikulu.”

songs.title: ‘LYO KAWILE PA CUNGULO,
songs.title2: AT EVEN ERE THE SUN WAS SET
songs.content:
‘Lyo kawile pa cungulo,
   Baishile abalwala;
Bafuma baya ne nseko,
   Abeshile baleteta.

Kabinge nombe cungulo,
   Ne fwe twaisapalama;
Natwishibe fyo mulipo,
   Nangula tushimumwene.

Tusansamuke, Katula,
   Pantu twalwala, twapina;
Bamo tabalamutemwa,
   Bambi bamufutatila.

Bamo basange fyo calo
   Tacisekesho mutima;
Kuli imwe tabesako
   ‘Kuti bapwishe cilaka.

Tapalya batusha bwino,
   Pantu tababulwe fibi;
Abamufwaisha na bo
   Bali ne fibi mu kati.

Mwe Shikulu mwali muntu,
   Mwacushiwe no kweshiwa;
Tatwafise fibi fyesu,
   ‘Menso yenu yalamona.

‘Kukumya kwenu kwa kale
   Kulipo nomba na maka;
Pa cungulo nu nshite yi,
   Muposhe bonse nakalya.

songs.title: MUTUFUMYE NO BUPALO
songs.content:
Mutufumye no bupalo
Mu mitima yesu pe;
Tube no kutemwa kwenu,
Twange mu luse lwenu.
    Mutukoshe, mutukoshe,
    Lyonse tuli pano nse.

Nu mucinshi twatotela
Pa mashiwi yasuma;
Yabe fya kulya fya mweo,
Yekale mu mitima.
    Imwe bene, imwe bene,
    Mube ne fwe nshiku pe.

E lye lintu twapalama
No kufuma mu calo,
Ilyo tuketwa ku mulu,
Tuketaba ne nseko.
    Tukekala, tukekala
    Na Yesu inshiku pe.

songs.title: MWE BA SHIFWE WA MU MULU,
songs.content:
Mwe ba Shifwe wa mu mulu,
   ‘Shina licindikwe;
‘Bufumu bwisho, bufwayo
   Bucitwe pano nse.

Mutupe lelo ifilyo;
   Mutwelele fibi,
Ifyo twelela banensu
   Abatubale fwe.

Mwituleta mu kweshiwa,
   Mupokolole fwe,
‘Bufumu bwenu na maka,
   ‘Lulumbi pe na pe.        Amen.

songs.title: UPEPE KU MACACA,
songs.content:
Upepe ku macaca,
Upepya kasuba,
Upepe pa cungulo,
Upepyo bushiku.
No mutima onse wise,
‘Fya pa nshi ufumye;
Ku mobyo lefukama,
Mu nkama upepe.

Ibukishe fibusa,
Pepela babiyo;
Pepela abalwani,
Nga balekucusha.
Ulombe ngo li weka
Ifyo ulebulwa;
Amapepo lomba mwi
Shina lya kwa Yesu.

Nga wabulwe cifulo,
Mu nkama upepe;
Lelwa matontonkanyo
Yabuta yabepo.
‘Mupashi ulekwafwo
Kwisa na mapepo
‘Ya kufika ku mulu
Kulyu yo umfwa pe.

Tatuli na bupalo
Ubwaba nga bulya
Shifwe aletupela
Nga twaisalomba.
Uli ne nsoni, bushe?
Kuli Yesu pepa.
Lesa, sekela,
Lesa ‘likutemwa.

songs.title: YESU E MPALUME YESU,
songs.content:
Yesu e Mpalume yesu,
    ’Fibi fyesu asenda,
Cisuma tutwale fyonse
    Kwa Lesa mu kupepa.
Nangu ifwe twayanshiwa,
    Twikatisho kulomba;
Nangu tuleculacula,
    Tupepe mu mitima.

Bushe tuli no kweshiwa?
    Bushe tulecula pe?
Ifyo fine twinenuka,
    Kuli Yesu tulombe.
’Mpalume imbi takuli,
    Ya mpomfu ne ya luse;
Yesu atwishiba bonse,
    E calenga tupepe.

Bushe twatwikwe fisendo,
    Na maka tatukwete?
Yesu e Katula wesu,
    Mu mapepo tumwebe.
Ilye fibusa fyatusha,
    Yesu takatushe ’yo,
Mu maboko atubaka,
    Tukasango butusho.

songs.title: ’MILIMO MUKUSHE,
songs.content:
’Milimo mukushe,
Mube ne few bonse;
Ku maka yenu musose,
Bomfwe aba bantu.

    ’Milimo mukushe,
    Tulebombela yi;
    Mwike, Bashikulu, mwike,
    Mwise mutupale.

’Milimo mukushe,
Mulumbuke konse.
’Kutemwa kwenu kube pe
Mu mitima yesu.

’Milimo mukushe,
Mupalya mashiwi;
Tupoke no busumino
Mu mitima yesu.

’Milimo mukushe,
Balapilya bengi;
’Shina lyenu lilumbuke,
Mutupale bonse.

songs.title: UBUFUMU BWISE,
songs.content:
Ubufumu bwise,
   ’Bwa lusho, lubuto,
Bulete pano pe sonde
   ’Mutende na mano.

Mu mitima yesu
   Mwise mutekemo;
’Cilaka ca bololoke
   Cibelelelemo.

Ubufumu bwise,
   Bukumane konse;
’Mashiwi musalanganye,
   ’Yapele cikuku.

’Bena fyalo bonse
   Bwangu bapalwemo;
Babe bwananyina bonse,
   Bekale fye pamo.

Ubufumu bwise,
   Ne cipuna cenu
Muciteke panwe sonde,
   Mupalya ba calo.

songs.title: TATA, MUMFWE BAMWANO,
MWE MFUMU ‘LINTU TWAPEPA
songs.content:
Mwe Mfumu ‘lintu twapepa
    Ku cipuna cenu,
Twaiso kuyebelela
    No kupato bubi.

‘Lintwi mitima yafina,
    E lyo mutwelele,
No kutumona no luse,
    ‘Kuti tukoshiwe.

‘Lintu twaesha ne ndimi
    Ukumulumbanya,
Muleke mitima yesu
    Itotele pamo.

‘Mifwaile yesu yonse
    Tulete kuli ‘mwe.
Te ‘ti tutemwishe kantu
    Kano mwatupela.

Tupepe no busumino,
    ‘Kwibukisha shifwe,
Fyonse ifyatuwamina
    Atupa mu luse.

songs.title: MWE TATA, MWE TATA TULI PANO
songs.content:
Mwe Tata, mwe Tata tuli pano
Ku kulumbanye shina lyenu.

Natumfwa, natumfwa ukulila
Kwa bantwa babulo kwishib.

Balenda, balinda na mu nshila
Isha kuya ku bonaushi.

Mukoshe, mukosha bantu benu,
‘Kuti babe ni nkmbe shenu.

Mutume, mutumya ba kusosa,
Bashimike landwe lisuma.

‘Bufumu, bufumu bwenu bwise
Bwangu bwangu nu calo conse.

songs.title: MU NSHITA YE TUNKO
songs.content:
Mu nshita ye tunko
   Mungafwe Yesu,
Epali nakana
   Ishina lyenu.
Nga natelententa,
   Mulendolesha,
‘Kuti nelyo cino
   Cinengo kuwa.

Nge misamwe ibi
   Mpene mfwaishe,
Nelye fyume fingi
   Finjite nonke;
Lyene muncinkule
   Ca Getsemane,
E lyo njibukishe
   Ca pa Kalbale.

Pambi nga mwancusha
   Ku bwembwa bwenu,
Te kuti ‘mukanye,
   Nshipikishe fye.
Pantu mulengwamya,
   Mulenteyanya;
‘Bana benu bonse
   E fyo bacitwa.

Nga bakesantwala
   Kunshishi pano,
Leka nkesemona
   Ifya ku mulu.
Ni pa cine cenu
   Nshintililepo;
Mumbule mwe Mfumu
   Kulya ku mweo.

songs.title: BA LUSE, BA CIKUKU,
songs.title2: GOD OF PITY, GOD OF GRACE
songs.content:
Ba luse, ba cikuku,
Twise ku cinso cenu;
Pepekeni mu mulu:
     Mumfwe, mutwafwe.

Monsho mo tulongana,
Lyonse ilyo tupepa.
‘Kulomba, ‘kupapata:
     Mumfwe, mutwafwe.

Ilyo kutemwa kwenu
Kulebomba muli ‘few,
E lyo twise kuli ‘mwe;
     Mumfwe, mutwafwe.

Nga twawa no kuluba,
No kubulo kuluba,
Mu luse muletwafwa:
     Mumfwe, mutwafwe.

Ngo bulanda bwaisa,
Bwa kututininkisha,
Tuteke ne mitima:
     Mumfwe, mutafwe.

Fyonse fyo twingalomba
Mu nshita ya kupepa,
Mufumye fitucusha:
     Mumfwe, mutwafwe.

songs.title: NJEBE FYEBO FYA KALE,
songs.title2: TELL ME THE OLD, OLD STORY
songs.content:
Njebe fyebo fya kale,
‘Fintu fya ku mulu,
‘Fya llumbi no luse
Fya kwa Yesu Kristu.
Unshimikile bwino
Pamo nga ku kanya,
Pantu nshakwata maka,
Ndi uwakowela.

     Njebe fyebo fya kale,
     Luse lwa kwa Yesu.

Njebe fyebo bwimo
‘Kuti gumfwikishe,
‘Bupususho bukulu
‘Bwacitile Yesu.
Ufinandile lingi,
Ne ulaba bwangu.
Umume wa lucelo
Taukokola ‘yo.

Ntepeleshe fyebwe fi
Ne shiwi lyanaka;
Ibukisha ndi mubi
Untu afwilile.
Unshimikile pe fye
‘Fyebo fimo fine,
Ifya kunsansamusha
Mu nshita ya bwafya.

Njebako ifi fine
Ilintu wamona
Ifyo ifya mu calo
Fyalaswa figanshe.
Ne lintu mulu wine
Lesa ‘kanjiswila,
Unjebe fi fya kale:
“Yesu akuposha.”

songs.title: “ONSE UTEMENWE!” BOMFWE BONSE!
songs.content:
“Onse utemenwe!” Bomfwe bonse!
Tumeni landwe li mu calo conse!
Lekeni beshibe abantu bonse:
        “Utemenwe engesa!”

            “Onse watemwa! onse watemwa!”
            Bileni monse mu mpili ne nika:
            Uwito waluba ni Shifwe Lesa:
            “Utemenwe engesa!”

Onse uleisa ecelwako;
E kuli no mwinshi waisulwako;
Ne shila ya mweo yene yabako:
        “Utemenwe engesa!”

“Onse utemenwe!” Lesa ‘bila;
“Onse utemenwe!” cebo cashila;
“Onse utemenwe!” mweo wacla:
        “Utemenwe engesa!”

songs.title: IFYO NDI-NSHITELEBWILA,
NATEMWO KUMFWIKISHE
songs.content:
Natemwo kumfwikishe
    Landwe lya kwa Yesu;
Imfumu ya lulumbi
    Yaishile pa nshi;
Ninaka no kubipa
    Lelo naishiba
Aishilyo kuntula
    Pantu anremwisha.

Kale Yeswa ‘ikele
    Umwana nga ine,
Ukunango kwikala
    Bwino inshiku pe.
Nalaesho kukonka
    Mu nshila yakwe pe;
Te ‘ti andabe ine,
    Pantu antemwisha.

‘Kuti njemulumbanya,
    Ndemwimbilo lwimbo;
Nangula nshimumona,
    Wene alegumfwa;
Kabinge alindaya
    Ukuti nkayeko,
Ukwimba na bangeli
    Pantu antemwisha.

songs.title: MWITYA BALELOBA, NA BWA BALEFWA,
songs.content:
Mwitya baleloba, na bwa balefwa,
    Mubalulule bekaya ku mfwa;
Mwise na baluba, mwimye abwa,
    Bashimikileni fya kwa Yesu.

         Mwitya baleloba, na bwa balefwa,
         Yesu wa luse e uletula.

 Nelyo bamupata, alindilila,
    Apokelela abalapila;
Mubatembetembe, mubapapate,
    Alebasamba nga basumina.

‘Bantu ba bulanda, abapelelwa,
    Kristu wa luse e uleposha;
Mube ne cikuku, mulebatemwa,
    Bese ku Mfumu, ilebakosha.

Mube ne cikuku, e co cawama;
    Yeswa leafwa ‘bamubombela;
Bwesheni mu mfifi, fumyeni ku mfwa,
    Bebenya muti, “Yesu atula.”

songs.title: KWEKO KUFWAYA ABALUBILE,
songs.content:
Kweko kufwaya abalubile,
   No kupapata luse luse;
Yesu ati, “’Seni kuli ine,”
   E fyo ne lelo alebeta.

       Akuyeni . . . mu tumshi tonse . . .
       ‘Kubaleta . . . abaluba . . .
       ‘Kubaleta . . . ku Mwine kacema . . .
       Yesu Kristu . . . ‘wabafwilile.

Tubafishe kweka kuli Yesu,
   Abanaka na balecula,
No kubalanga ubupususho.
   Beshibe mwa kumweno mweo.

Twafwayo kube nkombe sha luse,
   ‘Kukonka Kristu ‘nshiku shonse,
Twafwe abawa, na bwa banaka,
   ‘Baluba tubalange Yesu.

Tucetekele nshita ikesa
   Yeswa ‘kabwela mu lulumbi,
Natwipeleshe ku mulimo yo,
   ‘Banenswa bengi bapusuke.

songs.title: MWISE KWA YESU, MWIKOKOLA,
songs.content:
Mwise kwa Yesu, mwikokola,
Mu nkalata ‘tulange nshila.
Pa kati kesu ali nomba,
    Mwikokola, mwise.

         ‘Kulongana no kusekela,
         Ne mitima iyabutisha;
         Yesu ne mwe tukalongana
         Ku mwesu ku mulu.

Ushakenye abana kale 
Euleita imwe mwise;
Lyi Mfumu yenu saleni,
    Mwikokola mwise.

Tontonkanyeni ali pano,
Ilandwe lyakwe tesheniko,
‘Mashiwi yalesoswa yano;
    Mwikokola mwise.

songs.title: TANDA ULUCELO
songs.content:
Tanda ulucelo
‘Mbuto sha mutembo,
Tanda akasuba
Na pa cungulo;
Ukalalolela
Ubulobololo,
Few tukasaleta
‘Fya kututila.

   ‘Fya kututila, ‘fya kututila,
   Tukesakela pa kututila.

Tanda kalebala,
E na mu finshingwa,
Te kutine mfula
Nelyo ni mpepo
Ilyo ncito yapwa,
Pa bulobololo,
Few tukesaleta
‘Fya kututila.

Muye mulelila,
‘Kutandile Mfumu,
Nelyo fya bucushi
Fyatuponena;
Ngo kulila kwapwa
Akatusengela,
Few tukesaleta
‘Fya kututila.

songs.title: KULYU BWITE BULEFUMA KWI SHILYA,
songs.content:
Kulyu bwite bulefuma kwi shilya,
    “Leteni ulubuto.”
Kulya bantu ba kuyapokolola,
    “Leteni ulubuto.”

    ‘Lubuto lwe landwe lisuma
         Lubalikile konse.
    ‘Lubuto lwe landwe lisuma
         Lubalike pe na pe.

Ili shiwi lya ku Makedoniya,
    “Leteni ulubuto,”
No bupe bwesu twakulatambika,
    “Leteni ulubuto,”

Icikuku ca kwa Yesu cise pe,
    Tutume ulubuto,
Ne misango ya kwa Yesu ibe fye,
    Tutume ulubuto.

Twinenuka mu kubombe milimo,
    Tutume ullubuto,
Tulonganya ba kwingila kwa Yesu,
    Tutume ulubuto.

songs.title: KULYA BANTWA BALECULA,
songs.content:
Kulya bantwa balecula,
    Apwe nshiku shileya;
Kulya bantwa baleloba,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.
‘Fwe tube aba kwafwa
Bonsha bali mu nshila,
Fingi kuti twacita,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.

         Shileya! Shileya!
              Shileya! Shileya!
         ‘Fwe tube aba kwafwa,
              Apwe nshiku shileya!

Tube bonsha ba cikuku,
    Apwe nshiku shileya;
Tube bonsha ba lubuto,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.
Abwa bawa, bacewa,
Abalile filamba,
Tweshe ukwimya aba,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.

‘Fya mu calo filepwa fye,
    Apwe nshiku shileya;
‘Fya kwa Lesa fyashala pe,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.
‘Mbuto shonse shesuma,
Ishwa bantu batanda
Shatwala mu mitima,
    Apwe nshiku shileya.

songs.title: IFWE NATUMFWE LANDWE,
songs.content:
Ifwe natumfwe landwe,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Kabebenikwa muti,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Kabiyeni ne lamdwe,
Muye mu fyalo fyonse,
E funde ilya Mfumu,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”

Bilikisha kwi shilya
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Ku bantu shimikila,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Mwimbile mwe fyambeshi,
Nobe calo sumina
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”

Sanshikisha mashwi,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Pantu alyanshishe mfwa,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Tepelesho mutima
‘Waikala mu mfifi,
Ku nshishi sanshikisha,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”

Cishibikwe fye konse,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
‘Ndupwa shonse nashange,
    “Yesu Mupusushi.”
Bilikisha ku bantu
Ba fyalo fya kutali,
“Natuletelo bumi,
    ‘Yesu Mupusushi.’”

songs.title: MWIMBE KABILI KULI ‘NE,
songs.content:
Mwimbe kabili kuli ‘ne,
   Ifyebo fya mweo!
Monyo busuma ne cine,
   Ifyebo fya mweo.
E fyebo fya bumi,
Finjebe fya cine.

       Fyaliwama, fyalibuta
       Ifyebo fya mweo!

Kristu alepela bonse
   Ifyebo fya mweo.
Mumfwe ukwita kwe luse,
   Ifyebo fya mweo.
Ca bupe, ca cine,
Cilange fa Mwine.

Mwebe bonse fya Katula,
   Ifyebo fya mweo,
‘Fya Mfumu ‘yabafwilile,
   Ifyebo fya mweo.
Mwe Katula wine,
Muwamye ku cine.

songs.title: BUSUMA SANO BUSHIKU,
songs.content:
Busuma sano bushiku,
    Apo nasanga katula;
‘Mutima wandi wayanga.
    Ndeeba fye ‘bantu bonse.

         Kushuka! Kushuka!
         Ilyo ansamba ku fibi!
         No kumfudisho kupepa,
         No kusekele nshiku pe.
         Kushuka! Kushuka!
         Ilyo ansamba ku fibi!

‘Mulandu onse upwile!
    Ne wa kwa Yesu, nafutwa;
Ankula ine no luse,
    Na ine nomba ndekonka.

Utushe nombo mutima,
    Wifuma ku Mfumu yobe;
E mo umwena fyonse fye,
    ‘Fisuma fyonse ukwete.

Lesa aumfwe layano,
    Akulaumfwe nshiku pe;
Isuke imfwa ikese,
    Nkalumbe Mfumu ya luse.

songs.title: ITENI FITA, ‘BULWI BWAFIKA,
songs.content:
Iteni fita, ‘bulwi bwafika,
Imyeni lunga lwa Mfumu;
Ikatisheni, koseleleni,
‘Shiwi lyakwe e liletwita.

    Akuyeni, mwe bashilikale,
    Teyanyeni, shangileni fye;
    Akuyeni no kwimba Hosana,
    Cilongoshi mwine ni Kristu.

Koseni bonse, lwisheni fita,
Twalishibe fyo tukansha;
Sendeni nkwela ya busumino,
Lupanga lwe shiwi lya Mfumu.

Lesa wa bonse muletwafwa pe,
Mutupe bonse ‘cikuku;
‘Bulwi nga bwapwa, na ifwe twansha,
Tkafwikwe ngala sha mweo.

songs.title: KU MFUMU YANDI NE LANDWE,
songs.content:
Ku Mfumu yandi ne landwe,
    Nshileba na nsoni;
Ncindiko lupanda lwakwe,
    Ndame shiwi lyakwe.

    E ni ku lupanda e ko nashibukile,
    Kufinwa kwa mutima kwalipwa;
    Uko kwine namwenyo lubuto,
    Nomba ndasekele shiku pe.

Yesu Mfumu, nimwishiba!
    Ishina lya luse!
Te kuti anenge nsoni
    Nelyo kumposa fye.

Naipela kuli yesu,
    E wampelo mweo;
E ukalambaka bwino,
    Nsuke mfike kulya.

Akanumbula ku mulu
    Kuli Lesa wishi;
Akampela ne cifulo
    Ku mwabo ku mushi.

songs.title: NCETEKELA YESU PE,
songs.content:
Ncetekela Yesu pe,
‘Nshita ne nshiku shonse,
Nangu ilyo nanaka,
Yesu nacetekela.

     Ncetekela Yesu pe,
     ‘Nshita ne nshiku shonse,
     Nga fyamponena fyonse,
     Ncetekela Yesu pe.

‘Mupusushi ulengafwa,
Ku mfifi ya mutima,
Ntungululwe mu nshila,
Yesu nacetekela.

Nyimba ilyo kwabuta,
Mpepa ilyo kwafita,
‘Mwita ilyo nasanswa,
Yesu nacetekela.

Ncetekela mu bumi,
Ncetekela mu mfifi,
Ku mulu pa kufika,
Yesu nacetekela.

songs.title: MWE KATULA MWINCILILA,
songs.content:
Mwe Katula mwincilila,
    Ndemupapata,
Apo muleita bambi,
    Mwilancilila.

         Yesu, Yesu,
              Mumfwe ndekuta,
         Apo muleita bambi,
              Mwilancilila.

Kampalame kuli imwe,
    Mpelwe uluse,
Kamfukame no bufuke,
    Nsangyo mutende.

Mu busuma bwenu bweka
    Ncetekela pe.
Mulemposha no kunteka,
    ‘Mone no bupe.

Ni ‘mwe mweo no buseko,
    Ni ‘mwe cikuku,
Umbi pa nshi nshimumwene,
    Nangu mu mulu.

songs.title: BONSE LUMBANYENI LESA WESU,
songs.content:
Bonse lumbanyeni Lesa wesu,
    ‘Luse atuvelela;
Tumutemwe pantu atutemwa,
    ‘Buku lyakwe lyatweba.

         Yesu mwine aishile
         Kuno twaba fwe bantu;
         Ku kufwayo kupususha
         Fwe bonsha balubile.

Bonse fwaisheni Lesa wesu,
    Pantu akulatwafwa;
Calilembwa Lesa aleumfwa
    Bonsha balepalama.

Bonse sumineni Lesa wesu,
    E mo tuleshukila;
Alefwaya tumucetekele,
    Iyi nshila isuma.

songs.title: YESU MFUMU NAPAPATA,
songs.content:
Yesu Mfumu napapata,
Nga tamwangafwe nalafwa;
‘Bupususho mundetele,
   Mumbule fintu ndi.

       Mumbule fintu ndi,
       Mumbule fintu ndi,
       Yesu Kristu mwamfwilile,
       Mumbule fintu ndi.

Ninaka no kubipilwa,
Wansumine umulopa,
Muncite mbe co mwatemwa,
   Mumbule fintu ndi.

Nshikwete mako kucita
Nangu cimo ca kwitula,
Mumbule pe, ni ‘mwe mweka,
   Mumbule fintu ndi.

Ndolesheni, mwe Katula,
Muncitile co mwatemwa,
Mutendeke no kupwisha,
   Mumbule fintu ndi.

songs.title: ‘KAFUKAUKA KALIPO,
songs.content:
‘Kafukauka kalipo,
    ‘Mulopa wa kwa Yesu,
Na ‘bo abalesambwamo
    Balebuta tutu.

‘Mupupu ‘wafwa ‘sekele
    Pa kafukauka,
No mubyu wacila ni ‘ne,
    Nsambwemo mutima.

Ku busumino namwene
    ‘Filaso fya kwa Yesu,
Nalubulwa mu mfwa yakwe,
    Ntakishishamo pe.

‘Lwimbo lusuma ndeimba,
    ‘Kupususha kwakwe,
Na mu mulu nkalaimba
    ‘Kutemwa kwakwe pe.

songs.title: BASHUKA ‘BALANGWE MPANGA,
songs.content:
Bashuka ‘balangwe mpanga,
Icalo ca kwange cibi,
Balumbule fyawamisha,
Cawamo kuvo mom wine.

     Bashuka! bashuka!
     Abaikalo mo mwine.

‘Musebo e wa nsayabu,
E muli ifyawamisha,
‘Busuma ne fya bupapo,
Ne nseko pa kufikamo.

Muli ukutemwa kwa pe,
‘Kulya no kufwala bwino,
Ukwimba e kwawamisha,
Cawamo kubo mom wine.

Muli umutende w ape,
Ububi tabwingilamo,
‘Bucushi tabumoneka,
‘Ba nseko beka babamo.

Imfumu itulungike,
Tube fye abalingana,
E lyo ‘lintu tukafika
Tukalayanga ne nseko.

songs.title: ‘LUNGA LULEPUPA,
songs.content:
‘Lunga lulepupa,
   Lwasonto mulu,
Ukukoselesha
   Aba kwa Yesu,
Kwenda pano pa nshi,
   E fyo tupepa,
No mutima onse
   ‘Kwinba mu nshila.

       ‘Lunga lulepupa,
           Lwasonto mulu,
       Ukukoselesha
           Aba kwa Yesu.

Yesu mwe Shikulu,
   Natusekela,
Pa makasa yenu
   Natulongana.
‘Lingi twafutata,
   ‘Lingi twaluka;
Mutulame, Yesu,
   Mu nshila ipya.

Imwe mwalyu mwana,
   Pamo nga ifwe;
Mutuwamye bonse
   Tucili bana.
Mu nshita twasanswa
   Tubutukile
Kuli Yesu Mwine,
   Te kuli umbi.

Mututungulule
   ‘Nshiku shonse pe,
Mutwafweko, twanshe
   ‘Balwani bonse.
Ebenya bangeli
   Batubake pe;
Twelelwe, tutulwe,
   Twaya kuli ‘mwe.

songs.title: KUNO TULAKALIPWA,
songs.title2: HERE WE SUFFER GRIEF AND PAIN
songs.content:
Kuno tulakalipwa,
Kuno tulalekana,
   Ku mulu te ifyo.

       Cikabe cisuma
       ‘Lintu tatwakalekane.

Bonsha batemwa Yesu,
‘Bafwa baya ku mulu
   ‘Kwimba na batulwa.

‘Bana bonsha banono,
Abapepa mu calo,
   Tabakabulweko.

‘Basambilishi besu,
‘Batwebe fya kwa Yesu,
   Na bo bakabako.

Tukalasekela pe,
‘Kumono Mupusushi
Pa cipuna cakwe.

Tukaba no buseko,
Tukalaimbo lwimbo
   Kuli Kristu ‘Mfumu.

songs.title: KUNTA, KUNTA, NANYU YU?
songs.content:
Kunta, kunta, nanyu yu?
‘Ulelinda, Musuma?
Yangu Mwine wa bufumu,
Takwamoneka ngo yu.
We mutima wandi, bushe
Te kuti umwiswile?

Kunta, kunta, e pwali,
Alelinda, Musuma;
Lelwe cibi nacipata,
Pantu palisapisha;
Imyunga na bakaenya
Naficiliko mwinshi.

Kunta, kunta, acili
Alelinda, Musuma,
Na maboko ayalaswa
Alekunta pa cibi;
Alolesha lusu luse,
Alinda, ‘Mupusushi.

songs.title: NDEIMBILA KALUBULA,
songs.title2: I WILL SING OF MY REDEEMER
songs.content:
Ndeimbila kalubula,
No kutemwa kuli ‘ne;
Anculile pa lupanda,
Ankakwile ku fibi.

     Ndeimbila . . . Klubula . . .
     No mulopa . . . ‘ndmbwile . . .
     Anjelele . . . pa lupanda . . .
     Amfutilyo . . . ‘nkakwile . . .

Ndeimbila Kalubula,
Ico ampuswisheko;
Na mu luse no kutemwa
Amfutilyo mulandu.

Ndeimbila Kalubula,
Ndeshimiko bwanshisho,
Ifyo aletwafwo kwansha
‘Fibi, ne mfwa, na ku Mbo.

Ndeimbila Kalubula,
Ne fyo alintemwisha;
Alimpokolola mu mfwa,
‘Kuti mbe mwana Lesa.

songs.title: MWIMININENI YESU!
songs.content:
Mwiminineni Yesu!
   Ni ‘mwe fita fyakwe;
Imyeni uluunga,
   Mwikalulofya mwe,
Aletutangilila,
   Fwe mulalo wakwe,
Asuke abacimfye,
   Abe Mfumu eka.

Mwiminineni Yesu!
   Sumineni bonse,
Kalweni na balwani.
   E ko alemwita.
Kabiyeni mwe bonse,
   Muye mulwe na bo,
Ikatisheni bonse,
   Mube abashipa.

Mwiminineni Yesu!
   Mu maka yakwe fye;
Amaka ya buntunse
   Te kuti yamwafwe.
Shangileni, pepeni,
   Mulemulolela;
Alemutuma Lesa,
   Kabiyeni bonse.

Mwiminineni Yesu!
   Ubuta bukapwa;
Mu calo kulwa pe pe,
   Mu mulu mutende.
Uyo wayansha fyonse
   ‘Citebo apelwa,
Akalateka uko
   Pamo na Kristu pe.

songs.title: ISHIWI NDEUMFWA,
songs.content:
Ishiwi ndeumfwa,
     Lyanjita kuli ‘mwe,
Ukunsamba no mulopa
     Untu wansumine.

           Yesu ndeisa,
                 ‘Kwisa kuli ‘mwe,
           Munsambe no mulopa
                 Untu wansumine.

Nangula ndi mubi,
     Yesu antemwisha,
Alemfumye mpulumushi,
     Alempela maka.

Yesu alenjita
     Ukukonko Mwine;
Ampelo bucetekelo,
     ‘Luse no mutende.

Yesu alempela
     ‘Maka mu mutima;
Ne cikuku alentula,
     Amfumya mu fibi.

Yesu amfwilile,
     Pantu nabipilwa,
Alefwaya musumine
     Mu mutima wandi.

songs.title: ‘MFUMU YESWA YASWIKE NIKODEMO,
songs.content:
‘Mfumu Yeswa yaswike Nikodemo,
Uwamubushishe nshila ya mweo,
Shikulwa ebele, ‘We kutikisha,
     Mulefyalwa cipya.

           Mulefyalwa cipya,
           Mulefyalwa cipya,
           Cine cine nakwebo kupusuka
                 Mulefyalwa cipya.

Mwe ban aba bantu kutikisheni,
‘Shiwi lya maka lya Mfumu umfweni,
Mwileke shiwi ili limupite:
     Mulefyalwa cipya.

Mwe balefwayo kutusha mu mulu,
No kwimbo lwa kutotela Shikulu,
‘Mfumu yati, “Nga mulefwayo mweo,
     Mulefyalwa cipya.”

Nomba lelo line wiposa nshita,
Katwishi cilebakwa po kalewa;
‘Shiwi lyati, “Nomba!” nobe asuka,
     “E, ndefyalwa cipya.”

songs.title: NNGUMFWE FYA MUPUSUSHI,
songs.title2: I HAVE HEARD OF A SAVIOUR'S LOVE
songs.content:
Nngumfwe fya Mupusushi,
Ukutemwa kwa kupapisha;
Busha fumine ku mulu
Pantu anangulukile ne wine?
Anangulukile ne wine.

    Ici cebo ca cishinka ne calingo
    Kupokelelwa,
    Ica kuti Kristu Yesu aishile
         muno calo
    Ku kutula babi.

Ningufwe fyo aculile
Pa kuya ku kufwa pa muti;
Bushe pabo ko calandwa
‘Kuti alinculile ine wine?
Alinculile ine wine?

    Alashilwe pa fya bupulumushi
         fyesu, afwantilwe
    Pa mpulu shesu;
    Akandilwe pali ifwe,
    E mo twamweno mutende no
         kupola.

Banjebe fyo kuli umulu
Ukamona ban aba Mwine;
Lelo bushe kwabe cifulo
Ico banteyanisha ine wine?
Banteyanisha ine wine?

    Mu nganda ya kwa Tata mwaba
    ‘Filulwe fingi,
    Acikanabe fyo nga nalimweba,
         Pantu nayamuteyanishisha
    Apa kwikala, ‘kuti tukabe pamo.

Ngasukeni ‘fyo ndebusha,
Mwe Mfumu, takuli umbi ‘yo.
Tepelesheni kuli ine,
Ukuti mu mulu muli ncende,
Na mwe muli Katula wandi.

    Eya e, yande yande!
    Eya e, yande!
    ‘Mfumu yaile ku Kalble kwine,
    Tupusuke iwe na ine.

songs.title: LESA WESU ATEMWENE CALO,
songs.content:
Lesa wesu atemwene calo,
Atumine Yesu
‘Kutufwila few babi.
Aimine ku mfwa.
Aile ku mulu.
Aleita ababi.
Uyu Yesu ni Mfumu
Ya ku mulu na pa nshi
. Tusumine Yesu.
Atupele ubumi.

songs.title: IYE PENGA LYA KWA LESA LIKOMFWIKWA MU
songs.title2: WHEN THE ROLL IS CALLED UP YONDER
songs.content:
Iye penga lya kwa Lesa likomfwikwa mu
        calo,
   Ilyo bukaca bwa lubuto tutu,
Ilyo abasalwa bakayalongana pe shilya,
   Ilya keta na mashina nkabeko.

       Ilyo keta na mashina,
       Ilya keta na mashina nkabeko!

Ubushiku bwa kutinya ilya bafwa bakema,
   No kumono bukata bwa kwa Kristu;
Ilyo abasalwa bakyalongana kwa Lesa,
   Ilya keta na mashina nkabeko.

Aleni tulebombela Shikulwifwe nshiku pe,
   Tuyelanda ku bantu ifya mweo;
Nge milimo yapwa, ne few twaya mu calo
        cilia,
   Ilya keta na mashina nkabeko.

songs.title: BUSHE TUYE KU MULONGA,
songs.title2: SHALL WE GATHER AT THE RIVER?
songs.content:
Bushe tuye ku mulonga,
    Ukuli na bangeli,
Ku mulonga walengama,
    Ku cipuna ca Mwine?

    E tuleya ku mulonga,
         Tukalongana na ba mushilo;
    Tukayanga pa mulonga,
         Uwatula kwi sano.

Tushe fyonse fishawama;
    Wa luse e utula,
Akatufwike fyawama,
    ‘Fisamo fya bashila.

Ku mulonga uwawam,
    Ukuli Yesu Mwine,
Ku cikuku baletasha,
    Baba ne senge line.

Ne fwe bwangu tukafika,
    Bwangu lwendo lukapwa;
E lyo lwimbo lwa mutende
    Lukomfwikwa pe na pe.

songs.title: UYO WANAKILA YESU KATULA,
songs.content:
Uyo wanakila Yesu Katula,
Uwasumina muli Mwana Lesa,
Napusuko kwabula ukfuta;
Yesu e wa maka ya kupususha.

    Umfwa we mune, Mfumu alekwita!
    Uluse lwakwe cine lwafulisha;
    Afwilyo kuti ababi batulwe,
    E wa maka ya kupususha bonse.

Uyo wanakile shiwi lya Mfumu,
Uwasumina ati “Amfwilile”,
Nalubuko kulubulwa ukwa pe;
Yesu e wa maka ya kupususha.

Uyo walapila nga ‘leke fibi,
Uwaipela kuli Yesu mwine,
Napula mu mfwa ‘ingila mu mweo;
Yesu e wa maka ya kupususha.

songs.title: NOMBA KWISHIBA NAISHIBA,
songs.content:
Nomba kwishiba naishiba,
Yesu antula no kumposha;
Amfumya mu mfifi na ku mfwa,
Mu mutima ankoselesha.

    Ndi ne cimwemwe, ndeanga pe,
    Ndetasha Yesu, Mfumu yandi.

Ndi ne cimwemwe, ndeangila
Ifyacindama fya kwa Lesa;
Mu mutima e mwamoneka
‘Maka ya Mfumu no kutemwa.

Nombo mutima watalala,
Yesu na ine bucibusa;
Ndelindilila, ndelolela,
Yesu umwine akabwela.

songs.title: CINE MINGUMFWE LANDWE LISUMA,
songs.content:
Cine mingumfwe landwe lisuma,
   Yesu amfwilile;
Ne ci cine cilempamfya sana,
   Bushe ndesumina?

   Eyo! eyo! Lesa nga angamfwa
       Ndebo mwina mwenu!
   Fintu mwamfwilile pa lupanda,
       Indeba wenu pe.

Uluse lwenu luntu lwafula,
   Lwakulo mutima;
Muli ‘mwe mweka, Katula wandi,
   Nalamusumina.

Mwaishibe fyo nshikwetya maka,
   Ndatina ukuwa;
Nimpenya maka mutumikile,
   Yenu yafulisha.

Na nomba, Mfumu, twamupapata,
   Mubafwa ‘ba bonse,
‘Kuti bembe no mutima umo,
   “Eyo! ndeba wenu.”

Kale bonse abamulombele,
   Abati, “Mungafwe”
Bwangu mwabaswike “Eyo”
   Cibe nge fyo nomba.

songs.title: BWELA, MWANA, WE WALUBA,
songs.content:
Bwela, mwana, we waluba,
    Wiso alekwita;
Wiluba pe mu fibi fi,
    Wilaba mulandu:
         Bwela, bwela.

Bwela, mwana, we waluba,
    Yesu alekwita;
E walenga ufuluke,
    Isa wikokola;
         Bwela, bwela.

Bwela, mwana, we waluba,
    Wiposa fye nshita;
Ku mfwa takuli na luse,
    E nshita atupa,
         Bwela, bwela.

songs.title: YESU AITA BABI,
songs.content:
Yesu aita babi,
    Abapokelela fye,
Bonse abalubile,
    Bonse bengabwela fye.

         Imbisheni, mwe bonse,
              Yesu aita babi;
         Ali no luse lonse,
              Abapokelela fye.

E wasosa, umfweni
    “Mwise mubyo mutende;
Mwe banaka iseni,
    Insende fibi fyonse.”

E usambo lubembu,
    E uposha mutima;
Nomba ku cilye cakwe
    Te ‘ti ntine nakalya.

Yesu mweo wa babi
    Ampokelela ine;
Nomba nimbuta tutu,
    Nkayafika ku mwine.

songs.title: ILYO FUBEFUBE AYA,
songs.title2: WHEN THE MISTS HAVE ROLLED AWAY
songs.content:
Ilyo fubefube aya,
Na kasuba katula,
Fyonse pa nshi fybalika,
No kunaka ku mfula;
No lubuto lwa kwa Lesa
‘Mfifi yonse lwatamfya,
Tukeshiba fyonse limbi,
Ilyo fube apita.

     Tukayashibana,
     Tukayaendelana,
     Ilyo lwendo pa nshi lwapwa,
     Na ku mulu batwita;
     Tukeshiba fyonse bwino,
 Pantu fube apita.

‘Lwendo lwesu lwaliyafya,
Mu mitima mwafita,
Tulabomba no kunaka,
Tulekana, tupita;
Lelo Yesu akatila,
“Iseni mwe bapalwa.”
Tukeshiba fyonse bwino,
Iyo fube apita.

Ifwe bonse tukayanga
Ilyo tukalongana
Na banensu ba kwi sano;
E lyo tukeshibana,
Tukembila Yesu pamo,
Pantu e watushita;
Iye mfifi yapwa, yaya,
Fubefube apita.

songs.title: ALIFWILE, UMUTU WA BULANDA,
songs.content:
Alifwile, Umutu wa bulanda,
   Atwikilwe fibi fyesu fyonse,
Ashipikisho kuti atutule,
   Alitwanshisha balwani bonse.

       “Ine ndi wa mweo, Uwafwile kale;
       Ine ndi wa mweo, Uwafwile kale;
       Moneni, ndi wa mweo wa pe na pe,
       Moneni, ndi wa mweo wa pe na pe.
       Ine ndi wa mweo,Uwamfwile kale;
       Moneni, ndi wa mweo wa pe na pe.”

Ali nomba mu mulu mu lulumbi,
   Atashiwa na bangeli bonse;
Wene atuposa ku numa yakwe,
   No kutusosela, atupususha.

Akabwela ifyo atulaile,
   Akesapoka abantu bakwe,
Akakwita twikale uko aba,
   Ku cifulo atuteyanishisha.

songs.title: MWE UMFWENI LANDWE LISUMA,
songs.content:
Mwe umfweni landwe lisuma,
    Kale twalya buluba;
Yesu afumine ku mulu,
    Cine atupuswishe.

         Watupuswishe ni nani?
         Cine cine Mwana Lesa!
         Musango nshi? Ni ku mulu.
         E kwa letupapatila.

Takwali umbi ‘kutufwila,
    Nelyo ni malaika;
Uwapopelwa pa lupanda
    E Mwana wa kwa Lesa.

Ili landwe lya kwa Katula
    Bacili balebila;
E Kawikishanya twakwata
    Ku kwa kulyo kwa Lesa.

Iso sumine muntu ali,
    No kumufukamina;
E lyo ukomfwo luse lwakwe,
    Cine akakutula.

songs.title: ‘CILIBWE CANDI, MWE MUPUSUSHI,
songs.content:
‘Cilibwe candi, mwe Mupusushi,
    Ni ‘mwe Cubo muntu mfisama.
Ni ‘mwe Cilibwe ica kuncinga,
    Muli imwe ndi no mutende.

    ‘Cilibwe candi, mwe Mupusushi
    Ni ‘mwe Mpalume, Ntungulushi;
    Muli Imwe e mo ncetekela,
    E co mfisamina muli ‘mwe.

‘Cilibwe candi lintu natunkwa,
    Ni ‘mwe Cilibwe mu kweshiwa.
Ni ‘mwe Cilibwe lintu ndecula,
    Muli mwe te kuti ntine.

‘Cilibwe candi ica kunkosha,
    Impalume yandi ya cine;
Muli mwe mweka ndecetekela,
    Muncite wa kunshangila pe.

‘Cilibwe candi icikashala,
    Ilintu bufumu bukapwa;
‘Cilibwe candi ca bupususho,
    Ndacetekela muli imwe.

songs.title: IMBILENI FYA KWA YESU,
songs.title2: WHEN WE ALL GET TO HEAVEN
songs.content:
Imbileni fya kwa Yesu,
    Ukutemwa no luse,
Aletuteyanishisha
    Ubwikalo mu mulu.

         Nga twafika ku mulu
         Kukabo kusekela no kwanga;
         Nga twamona Yesu
         Tukembilako bwanshisho.

Apo tucili mu lwendo,
    ‘Lingi tukafitwamo;
Lelo nga twafika kwesu,
    Tatwakafitweko ‘yo.

Natubya ba cine cine,
    Tutumikile Yesu;
Pa kumumona mu mulu,
    Awe tukasekela.

Aleni! Twendeni bane!
    Bwangu tukamumona,
Bwangu mulu ukesuka,
    Ne fwe tukengilamo.

songs.title: MU KWESHIWA MUNTU MPONA,
songs.content:
Mu kweshiwa muntu mpona,
Mu myunga intu nyantapo;
Mwe Mfumu cimo cashala,
    Mulenjibukisha.

    Mulenjibukisha! Mulenjibukisha!
    Ndetina nshi ngo li mupepi,
    No kunjibukisha.

‘Masakamano yafula
Ayamfisha ku mutima;
Ici e cilensekesha,
    Mulenjibukisha.

Mu fyawama, mu fyabipa,
Mu fyabuta, mu fyafita,
Mfumu, tapali mulandu,
    Mulenjibukisha.

songs.title: MUFWIKE NGALA KRISTU MFUMU!
songs.content:
Mufwike ngala Kristu Mfumu!
‘Mikulo yonse ilumbanye;
Ululumbi kwi shina lyakwe,
Nomba ne nshiku pe.

    ‘Fwe tukamucite Mfumu
    Mu calo cilye ca lulumbi!
    Akabe Mfumu pe,
    Tukamulumbanya.

Muceleleni, mwe bangeli,
Mu masese ne nyimbo shonse;
‘Bena fyalo baleawile
Mfumu ya shamfumu.

Ni Kacimfya acimfyo bubi,
Aleteke mitima yesu;
Mwi shina lyakwe tukansha pe,
‘Mfumu ya lulumbi.

songs.title: BWELA, WE WALUBA, WE WANAKA,
songs.content:
Bwela, we waluba, we Wanaka,
Mona Kacema akwita lelo;
Alefwaya ukukupusushsa,
Mupokelele, wilakokola.

    Yesu akwita, e wakutemwa;
    Umfwa Kacema alekwita.
    Alekufwaya no kukwita pe,
    Asosa ati, “Isa kuli ‘ne”

Alekupembela we ulefwa,
We walilubo kutali kwine;
Aliposele umweo wakwe
Kuti umone umweo iwe.

Kutika matwi, shi umfwe landwe
Lya Mulungami ‘wakufwilile;
Alepase fibi fyobe fyonse,
No kukupela umweo w ape.

Isa mu musango uwa cine,
Yesu e mwinshi wa kwingilapo:
Kacema alekusengasenga,
Wilubantika, isa witabe.

songs.title: KULI CALO CISUMA SANA,
songs.title2: THERE'S A LAND THAT IS FAIRER
songs.content:
Kuli calo cisuma sana,
Tulemona fye no mutima;
E ko Shifwe atulolela,
Akatupele nganda nsuma.

    Tukayamonana
    Mu calo cisume cabuta
    Tukayaikala
    Na Yesu Shifwe ‘pabuta.

Palya pasuma tukembila,
Pamo na bonse abashila,
Pantu ‘ko bulanda takwaba,
Takwakabe ca kutucusha.

Ukuli Shifwe wa kutemwa,
E ko tukayatotela pe
Pa fya bupe ifyo atupa
Ne fisuma fya nshiku shonse.

songs.title: NATULUBULWA NA YESU
songs.content:
Natulubulwa na Yesu
Twabwekeshiwa kwa Kristu,
Tulelange mfwa ya Mfumu,
    Asuke ‘se.

‘Mubili umwa culile
E walangwa mu mukate.
‘Kutemwa kwesu kufule,
    Asuke ‘se.

Lilya mu kucula kwakwe,
‘Mulopa watusumine;
Tunwe waini ‘fwe bonse,
    Asuke ‘se.

Ukucula kwakwe kale,
Pamo no kubwela kwakwe,
Fyalundwa ne cintu ici,
    Asuke ‘se.

 Lisuke penga lyumfwikwe,
Ne filindi fikasuke
Ne shiwi likulu ili,
    Akabwela.

Bucetekelo busuma!
Twikala no bulanda,
Tulinde no kusumina
    Asuke ‘se.

songs.title: “E MUBILI WANDYU YO NAPELA;
KANDYO MUKATE UYU,
songs.content:
Kandyo mukate uyu,
‘Mukate wa ku mulu;
E mubili wa Mfumu,
E mukate wa mweo.
Mpelwa make nshiku pe
Mulyu yo wamfwile.

Kanwe waini uyu,
Waini wa ku mulu;
E mulopa wa Mfumu,
E waini wa mweo.
‘Mweo wandi ni ‘mwe fye,
Nimbwe, nkule muli ‘mfwe.

songs.title: YESU E KATULA,
songs.content:
Yesu e katula,
    ‘Ntulo ya mweo;
Mu mitima yesu
    Mubyo lubuto.
‘Lubuto lwa mweo,
    ‘Mfumu itupe;
‘Lwa mutende na lo
    Lubalike pe.

‘Mukate wa babi,
    No wa ba nsala,
‘Filyo fya bakabi
    ‘Fyamokauka.
‘Bupususho bwenu
    Tulebufwaya;
‘Lukombo lwa mulu
    Tufwayo kunwa.

Mwe Katula wesu,
    Mutwingilile
Mu mitima yesu,
    Tusangululwe.
Tubutishe tutu,
    Mwabuta ni ‘mwe;
Ne mitima yesu
    Imupalanye.

Ne mwe mwe Mupashi,
    ‘Luse lutwafwe,
Mwikale ku mwesu,
    Ni ‘mwe Cipele.
Shifwe mutubule
    Pe shina lyenu,
No kupokelela
    ‘Kutota kwesu.

songs.title: ‘SHIWI LYENU LYA CIKUKU
songs.content:
‘Shiwi lyenu lya cikuku
    ‘Lintu mwatwebele,
Nomba ndecita, mwe Mfumu:
    Nalamwibukisha.

‘Mubili wamfunikile,
    E mukate wandi;
Kambulyo lukombo lwenu
    No kumwibukisha.

Getsemane te ‘ti ndabe,
    Uko mwanculile
Mu mulopa na mu mabe;
    Malamwibukisha.

Nga malolesho lupanda
    ‘Lwali pa Kalbale.
Ni ‘mwe Lambo mwamfwilile,
    Nalamwibukisha.

Kamwibukishe, na fyonse
    ‘Fya luse kuli ‘ne,
Pe fye ‘lyo ncili umumi
    Nalamwibukisha.

Nge lintu nkabulwa maka
    Ya kumwibukisha,
Nga mukesa mu bu mfumu
    Mukanjibukisha.

songs.title: NSHAWAMINA, MWE SHIKULU,
songs.content:
Nshawamina, mwe Shikulu,
   ‘Kuti munfikile;
Soseni shiwi limo fye,
   ‘Lya kuti nkakulwe.

Nshawamina, muli ine
   Mwasapisha sana.
Mfumu, mwikalemo shani?
   Soseni, ndepola.

Nshawamina, Lesa wandi,
   Lelo nshamukanye.
Kukanya uwamfwilile?
   Awe te ‘ti kube.

Mwise mundishe ‘nshite yi
   ‘Filyo fya ku mulu,
No kwikusho mutimo yu
   Ukutemwa kwenu.

songs.title: NI KUNO TUMONANA, MWE MFUMU,
songs.content:
Ni kuno tumonana, mwe Mfumu,
    Ni kuno njibukisha ifyenu;
Ni muno njikatishe cikuku,
    No bunake mposa pali imwe.

Kandye umukate wa kwa Lesa,
    No kunwa ne mwe wain’ wa mulu;
Kuno kampose fisendo fyonse,
    No kutusha mu kutemwa kwenu.

E nshita ya cilyo ne ya nyimbo,
    Ifya kulye fi namuntebeta:
Ni kuno kandye, kankokoleko
    Ne mwe mu nshite yi yawamisha.

Twaima bwangu; nacipwe cilyo,
    Lelo uluse lwenu lwashala;
‘Mukate na wain’ bafumyapo,
    Lelo mulipo, ni ‘mwe Katula.

‘Kulya kukonkana no kubiye,
    Fyonse fisonta ku fya mu mulu;
Fitushimikile fya buseko
    Fya ku bwinga bwa Mwana wa mpanga.

songs.title: KU CINTAMBA NA MFUMU,
songs.content:
Ku cintamba na Mfumu,
Tulye fya kulya fyesu
Fya mukate wa mulu.

Twafukama kuli ‘mwe,
Tumfwe ‘fyo muli pepi,
Luse lwenu tutashe.

Twabebeto lupanda,
Twaikatwo bulanda
Pa fyabipa twacita.

Nga tulefimpula wain’,
Fwe bonse  twibukishe
‘Mulopo wasumine.

Tupalame kuli ‘mwe
‘Kuti tusambilile
Mwatufutile fibi.

‘Fibi mutukakule,
‘Busumino bufule,
Umutende mutupe.

Mutungulule pe
Tukasuke tufike
No kwikala na imwe.

songs.title: NJISE KULI YESU,
songs.content:
Njise kuli Yesu,
   Kuti nayanga;
Akampo buseko,
   Ne wa bulanda.

   Njise kuli Yesu,
       Alampe nseko;
   Aleita pep e,
       ‘Bana banono.

Njise kuli Yesu,
   Omfwa mapepo,
Na o alintemwa,
   Alempususha.

Njise kuli Yesu,
   Akalansunga;
Alentungulula
   Ku calo cipya.

E ko balya bana
   ‘Bafwikwa tutu,
Bamona Katula,
   Ni Yesu Kristu.

songs.title: BNA BA KWA KRISTU,
songs.content:
Bna ba kwa Kristu,
‘Lintu muli mu nshila,
Imbileni Katula,
‘Milimo yakwe yonse.

    Tuleenda ku mwesu,
    Mu nshila ya kwa Lesa;
    Bamo nabatangila,
    Tukasanga bafika.

Inwineni amenso
Ku musumba wabuta,
‘Nganda ilya e ya pe,
‘Mfumu yesu ilipo.

Mwilatina, enda fye,
‘Calo cilia cisuma;
Yesu Kristu mu nshila
Aletwafwe nshiku pe.
 Mwe Mfumu twasumina,
No kusule fya calo,
Imwe muletubaka,
Twalakonka ku mpela.

songs.title: MWI BALA LYA MFUMU
songs.content:
Mwi bala lya Mfumu
   Iilya pano nse,
Mulyu tumaluba
   Utwawamisha.

‘Mulimi ni Kristu,
   Fyonse alimba;
Atemwo tunono
   No tukalamba.

Wene talesula
   ‘Tuntu tunini;
Tonse twatemwikwa
   Nankwe, mulimi.

Alitemwa bana
   Pamo na ifwe;
Alibapalile
   Kale pano nse.

Aleita bana,
   Bese bekale
Mwi bala mu mwakwe,
   Umo ateka.

Mfumu twaitaba,
   Mutusunge pe;
Mulefundisha
   Tumubombele.

songs.title: MU NGANDA MU MWABO
songs.content:
Mu nganda mu mwabo
   Umwana nafika,
Kwi tempele lya kwa Wishi
   Umwana naisa.

Nganda sha mafunde
   Shamucenamina,
Shapapa mashiwi yakwe
   Ya mano ne cine.

Lelo tabapelwa
   ‘Kwishibe fya cine;
Ku kusokolole nkama
   Mwaishile ni ‘mwe.

Inkama ya Mfumu,
   ‘Kuti tumwishibe;
Monekeni kuli ifwe
   Tukonke, tutemwe.

Iseni mwe Mfumu,
   ‘Kuti tumwishibe;
Monekeni kuli ifwe
   Tukonke, tutemwe.

Ikumbi mfifi
   Lipite kuli ‘fwe,
Ne mitima ikabuta,
   Bukaca ubwa pe.

Nga twamulolesha
   Tukamwishibisha,
Ba Wishi, Mwane, Mupashi,
   Muli Lesa umo.

songs.title: NDESEKELA TATA WA MU MULU,
songs.content:
Ndesekela Tata wa mu mulu,
Anjebele fya kutemwa kwakwe;
Mu nkalata ndemone fisuma,
Icacisha, Yesu alintemwa.

     Ndesekelela, alintemwa,
     Yesu, Yesu, alintemwa.
     Ndesekelela, alintemwa,
     Yesu alitemwa.

Nga namulaba no kwendauka,
Na lyo antemwa no ko naluba;
Ndebwelela bwangu kwa Katula,
Pa kwibukishe fyo alintemwa.

‘Lwimbo lwandi e lyo nkalaimba,
Nga namone Mfumu ikankala
Mu kucindama kwakwe kwakula;
Nkesunguka, Yesu alintemwa.

Ndemutemwisha Yesu ne mwane,
Antemenwe, e co andubwile;
Amfutilyo bubi ku mulopa;
Cine cine Yesu alintemwa.

Nga babushka, “Waishiba shani?”
Nati, “Pantu Yesu amfwilile.”
‘Mupashi wakwe unshimikila,
Unange fyo Yesu alintemwa.

Ndi no mutende pa kwishibisha;
Ndecetekela, nasansamuka,
Nombo mulwani afulumuka,
Nga namweba, “Yesu alintemwa.”

songs.title: YESU UWALI MU MULU
songs.title2: JESUS WHO LIVED ABOVE THE SKY
songs.content:
Yesu uwali mu mulu
Aishile pano muntu.
Mu lupapulo tumona
Ifyo wene aliwama.

Aendawike, ni Mfumu,
‘Kupela menso ku mpofu;
Na bengi bambya balwele
Ababelele uluse.

E lyo abebele cine
Ca kwa Lesa, bacicite;
E wa cikuku, afuka,
Atemwo kumfwa ku mwana.

Abantu bamufyengele,
Asamikwe, atanikwe;
Yalya maboko yawama
Pa muti bapampamine.

Ifyo afwile! e ico
Afuminyo ko ku mulu.
Mu Cipingo mwalilembwa,
Apoka bonsha baisa.

Aishibe balibipa,
Ne fibi filabacusha;
E lyo asosa mu luse,
“Nintemwo kuti mbafwile.”

songs.title: LESA UWABUMBILE
songs.content:
Lesa uwabumbile
   ‘Maluba yawama,
Kuti apokelele
   Nyimbo tumwimbila.
Nelyo tulya baluba,
   Aletwita, tati,
“Shi lekeni abana
   Bese kuli ine.”

Nelyo tulya banono,
   Mu nyimbo tushipe;
Abana muli Temple
   Abomfwile kale.
‘Mitima nga yafuka,
   Aletweba, ati,
“Shi lekeni abana
   Bese kuli ine.”

Ifyuni pe amona
   Ifilepupuka;
Omfwa ifyo filial
   Apasansamisha.
Kabinge pali ifwe
   Alolesha, ati,
“Shi lekeni abana
   Bese kuli ine.”

E lyo tupalamine,
   ‘Kuti tumwimbile;
Tapali na mulandu
   Wa kuti tutine.
Mwi Temple lya mutima
   Asosa kuli ‘fwe,
“Shi llekeni abana
   Bese kuli ine.”

songs.title: YESU KRISTU MUFUKE,
songs.content:
Yesu Kristu mufuke,
Moneni pali ine;
Mumbelel uluse,
Leka njise kuli ‘mwe.

Ndefwayo kuti njise,
Imwe mwinkaninina;
Mu bufumu bwa luse
Kanyingile kuli ‘mwe.

Mwana Lesa, ninjisa,
Ndefwayo kumukonka,
Mwe ba luse, ba congwe,
Mwalyu mwaice kale.

Nimpeni umutima
‘Watemwo kunakila.
Imwe pe mwalecita
‘Kufwaya kwa kwa Lesa.

songs.title: PE FYE LESA ‘LIPO,
songs.content:
Pe fye Lesa ‘lipo,
     Akulangumfwa;
Anjishiba mu ncito,
     Na mu kwangala.

Pe fye Lesa ‘lipo,
     Alamona pe,
Apafita fititi
     Na pabutile.

Pe fye Lesa ‘lipo,
     Nangu ndi mwana,
Ifyo mone, ‘fyo nsosa
     Alifishiba.

songs.title: INE NDI MULENDO,
songs.content:
Ine ndi mulendo,
   Ndi mweni pano;
Nelyo paliyemba,
   ‘Fibi filipo.

       Yesu atutemwisha,
       Akulatungulula,
       Tukasukya tufika
           Kulyu ku mwesu.

Ku mwandi kwawama,
   ‘Kushili fibi;
No ko ubulanda
   Pe fye tapali.

Lelo umulendo
   Engabutisha,
Nga ‘fwaye fifwalo
   Ifya kwa Lesa.

Yesu mumbutishe,
   Mumpe cumfwilo;
Lesa ‘ntungulula
   Pe fye mu lwendo.

Ine ndi mulendo,
   Kuno ndi mweni;
Ku mulu ku mwesu
   Kuli mupepi.

songs.title: ‘FINTU FYONSE FYAYEMBA,
songs.content:
‘Fintu fyonse fyayemba,
   ‘Finono, ‘fikulu,
Fyonse fyatusungusha,
   Fyalengwa na Yesu.

‘Maluba ‘yabalula,
   ‘Fyuni ifilila,
No tu tupelebesha,
   Konsho ko twangala.

 Ne mpili ishalepa,
   ‘Mimane yapita,
No kuwa kwa kasuba
   Ukwakashikila.

Umwela e ne mpepo,
   ‘Kasuba, mainsa,
‘Mabala ya fisabo,
   Fyonse Lesa ‘tupa.

‘Milombwa mu mutengo,
   Icani mu mpanga;
Amatete no luko,
   Fyonse ifitwafwa.

Amenso ya kun ona,
   Ne ndimi sha kweba
‘Fyo Lesa mukalamba
   Apange fi fyonse.

songs.title: YESU MFUMU ANTEMWA
songs.content:
Yesu Mfumu antemwa
Ifi naliishiba,
‘Bana bonse e bakwe,
Banaka, wenya kosa.

     Yesu antemwa,
     Cine antemwa,
     Yesu antemwa,
     Baibo anjebe fi

Yesu Mfumu antemwa,
‘Mulu anjiswilile;
Alansambe fyabipa.
No kundeko kwingila.

Yesu Mfumu antemwa,
‘Mupepi muno nshila,
Nga namucetekela
Akamfisha ku mulu.

songs.title: YESU E KACEMA,
songs.content:
Yesu e Kacema,
E Mupusushi;
Mu maboko yakwe
Tukatina nshi?
Tuye tumukonke,
Aletangila,
Nangu ku mulundu,
Nelyo ku nika.

Yesu e Kacema,
‘Lintu asosa,
Amashiwi yakwe
Yasansamusha.
Nelya kalipila,
Ali ne congwe;
Atutungulula
Fwe mpanga shakwe.

Yesu e Kacema,
Atufwilile;
No mulopa wakwe
Atushitile.
Atulemba bonse
Ne shina lyakwe;
Ati, “Abantemwa,
Bena banandi.”

Yesu e Kacema,
Atusunge pe;
Akatutandwila
‘Mimbulu yonse.
Nga twapalamina
Ku mfifi ya mfwa,
Te ‘ti tukatine,
Tukansha ne mfwa.

songs.title: MWE BANA, TEMWENI YESU,
songs.content:
Mwe bana, temweni Yesu,
   Amumona ku mulu;
Mulumbanishisho luse,
   ‘Bupususho bukulu.

       E cisuma, e cisuma,
           Ukulumbanya Yesu.

Ku mulu ilya fumine,
   ‘Kwisaikala pano,
Abana balimwimbile,
   Abapalo bupalo.

‘Lintu banyina batwele,
   Kuli wenya banono,
Mu mabokwa babulile,
   Abapalo bupalo.

Mwe bana, temweni Yesu,
   E Mpalume yenu pe;
Kuno nga mwamulumbanya pe.
   Mukalalumbanya pe.

songs.title: MUNCITE MBE ULUBUTO
songs.content:
Muncite mbe ulubuto
    Lwa kubengeshima;
‘Kulubingu ka mulilo
    Konse nakulaya.

Muncite mbe kaliluba,
    ‘Kusekesha bonse,
Akatemwo kubalula
    Mwi bala linono.

Muncite mbe akalwimbo
    Ukwafwa ‘bacula,
Ulwa kufumyo bulanda
    No kusansamusha.

Muncite mbe umutambu
    ‘Kwafwa bashakosa,
E lyo ku maka mwampela
    Nabatumikila.

Muncite, ‘mweo wandi
    Ube akalwimbo,
Aka malumbo ya cine
    Na ka matotelo.

songs.title: ILYA KESA, ILYA KESA
songs.content:
Ilya kesa, ilya kesa
‘Kupende fisamo
Fyakwe fyonse ifyafina
Fintu atemwa.

   Nge ntanda mu mulu
   Ifwe tuli fisamo,
   Fikalabeka fyonse
   Mu ngala yakwe.

Yesu Kristwa kalonganya
Kwi sano fisamo
Ifyawama, ifyabuta,
Fintu atemwa.

‘Bana bonse, ‘bana bonse,
Abatemwa Yesu,
E fisamo ifyafina
Fintu atemwa.

songs.title: KU CIPUNA CA KWA LESA
songs.content:
Ku cipuna ca kwa Lesa
    Abengi baliko,
Abana abaelelwa,
    Ibumba lya nseko.

         Baleanga anga anga.

Mu fifwalo fyabutisha
    Nbafwikwa bonse,
Mu lubuto baikala,
    Na mu buseko pe.

Kale bali abanono
    Nge fyo mwaba imwe;
Lilya tabaishibe ‘yo
    Ukulumbanye fi.

Bushe cinshi cabatwele
    Ku mulu kwabuta,
Kuntu buseko, mutende,
    No luse fyafula?

Pantu Yesu afwililya
    Bana bapusuke;
Nomba basambwa ku Mwine,
    Bonse nababuta.

Pa nshi bafwaile Yesu,
    Balimutemenwe;
Nombe mpumi ya kwa Kristu
    Baleimona pe.

songs.title: SHIBUKENI BANA,
songs.content:
Shibukeni bana,
    Imbeni bonse
Na mashiwi yenu:
    “Mfumu yafyalwa.”

Tuye tumufwaye,
    Tuli bana fye;
Ati, “Leka bana
    Bese kuli ‘ne”

Mwi tanga lya ngombe
    E mwasendama,
Amulela Meri,
    Nyina musuma.

Ku mulu we tanga
    Kulyo kutali,
‘Lutanda lunono
    Lulebalika.

Mwitina kwingila,
    Tumuletele.
Fyuma fya mu calo,
    ‘Bupe ku Mfumu.

Bupe alefwaya,
    Ubo bwacila
‘Fyuma fyonse ifyo
    Ifwe twaleta.

‘Mitime yabuta
    Yena e bupe
Ubo atemwisha;
    Tumuletele.

Nomba tuleisa
    ‘Kumucelela,
‘Mfumu ya lulumbi
    Yafyalwe lelo.

songs.title: ‘BUSHIKU BULECA,
songs.content:
‘Bushiku buleca,
   ‘Mfifi ‘lefuma,
Na pa kushibuka
   Twime twapepa.
Yesu, mwe Kacema,
   Namutulinda,
Paleni fwe bana
   Abo mwasunga.

Mutwafwe twimbile
   Na pa masansh,
‘Mulandu wa fyonse,
   ‘Filyo na menshi.
Na pali bamayo,
   E na batata,
Pa fibusa na fyo,
   Konsho ko baba.

‘Tuni tulelila,
   Lekeni twange,
Tulepupauka
   Na mu lwelele.
Fwe bali ngo tuni,
   Twimbe nshiku pe,
Na ku Mupusushi
   ‘Watufwilile.

‘Maluba yalola
   Na ku kasuba,
Na ko kabalika
   Pali yonsha ya.
Ine ndi nge luba,
   Mbalikileni,
Pe nakulalosha
   Menso kuli ‘mwe.

songs.title: TATA TULEMUTOTELA
songs.title2: FATHER WE THANK THEE FOR THE NIGHT
songs.content:
Tata tulemutotela
Pa bushiku na kasuba,
‘Butusho, ‘filyo, no luse,
Ne fitupe nseko fyonse.

Mutwafwe tucite bwino,
No kuba ba luse lelo,
Mu milimo no kwangala,
Tukule mu bwina Lesa.

songs.title: TWINA YERUSALEM
songs.content:
Twina Yerusalem
Twalilumbenye Yesu,
Ne mwe ban aba nomba,
Lumbanyeni Katula.

     Umfweni ‘fyo balelumbanya,
     Sansuleni ulwimbo.

Natutemwe Shikulu,
No kubelenga Baibo,
Twishibe fya ku mulu,
Natutote ku Mfumu.

‘Bakalamba na bana
Bonse fye baleimba.
Mwakatisho lwimbo lu,
Lufike na ku mulu.

songs.title: TULI BANA BANONO,
songs.content:
Tuli bana banono,
Tatwafyelwe bakankala;
Bushe twalacitila nshi
Yesu wa luse, musuma?

Ifwe bonse natukwata
Fyafula fya kucita pe.
Kushalike fya kwa ciwa,
Bonse tuleke fibi.

‘Lintu mu mitima yesu
Twatontonkanyo bukali,
Twilabikana fikansa,
Kano kwasuko mutende.

E lyo cisuma tuleshe
Ifipumo fya bukali,
Twalabikana fikansa,
Kano kwasuko mutende.

E lyo mutende no luse
Fileikala mu myesu;
Tubafwe ‘kuti bateke
Imitima muli Yesu.

Bonse bakwato lupanda
Lwa kuti bamusendele,
Imilimo ya cikuku
Ya kucitila Yesu pe.

songs.title: INE NKAFWALE NGALA, UKO KWESU;
songs.title2: I SHALL WEAR A GOLDEN CROWN
songs.content:
Ine nkafwale ngala, uko kwesu;
Nkatule cipe candi, uko kwesu;
    Nkafwikwe fyabuta,
    Nkembila Katula,
Uyo wanondola, uko kwesu.

    Uko kwesu, uko kwesu,
    Ubulanda bukapwa,
    Uko kwesu.

‘Mfifi yonse ikapwa uko kwesu,
Nkalamono lubuto uko kwesu,
    ‘Lubuto lusuma,
    Lulebengeshima,
Lwa kutungulula, uko kwesu.

Nkamono Mupusushi, uko kwesu;
Nkembilo luse lwakwe, uko Kwesu;
    Na ku menso yakwe.
    ‘Nyimbo tashakapwe,
Nkekala nankwe pe, uko kwesu.

songs.title: CINTU CA KUPAPE CIBI,
songs.title2: IT IS A THING MOST WONDERFUL
songs.content:
Cintu ca kupape cibi,
Ica kupapisha nga nshi,
Mwana Lesa aishile
Ku kufwila ne mwaice.

Ninjishibe fyo ca cine
Atemenwe ukwicefya.
Aculishe, amfwilile,
Pantu mwine antemwisha.

Nshiahibe fyo engantemwa
Ne mubi wa mwaice ne;
‘Kutemwa kwakwe kwakula,
Afwilyo kuti mutemwe.

‘Kutemwa kwakwe kuli ‘ne
Cintu ca kupapa cine;
Lelwe ci campele nsoni:
Nalimutemwa Panini.

Kamutemwishe, mwe Mfumu,
Kamwimbile no mutima,
Nakulaya ndamutemwa
Tukasukya tumonana.

songs.title: MWE LESA MULI BAKULU,
songs.content:
Mwe Lesa muli bakulu,
   Mwaba Tata na Katula.
Ine mupina mwancila,
   ‘Bene ba calo mu mulu.

Tata, bushe musumine
   Ukumfwa mapepo yandi,
Nangu kumfwa malumbanyo
   Ayo naleta ne mwano?

Ni ‘mwe Tata, muleke mbe
   ‘Mwana wenu wa bupete;
Mu kulanda, mu kubomba,
   Kancite fintu mwatemwa.

Ni ‘mwe Tata, ncetekela
   Muli imwe mwe Katula.
Ndefwayo kwenda mu nshila
   Ilyo imwe mwampingwila.

Mwe Tata, ilyo shikapwa
   ‘Nshiku shandi muno calo,
Mukansende mu kutemwa,
   Njikale ne mwe ku mulu.

songs.title: MULI FYONSE, MUNE WE,
songs.title2: BE THE MATTER WHAT IT MAY
songs.content:
Muli fyonse, mune we,
    Sose cine pe:
Mu kwangala, mu ncito.
    Sose cine pe.
E musango wawama,
Ulembe pamutima,
‘Watupele ni Lesa,
    Sose cine pe.

‘Cine cili ca mweo,
    Sose cine pe;
‘Bufi buli bwa mwenso,
    Sose cine pe.
E wa mwenso no musha,
‘Utemwa ukubepa,
Iwe wesho kushipa;
    Sose cine pe.

Nga wabepa lapila,
    Sose cine pe;
Pe fye ube wa kwansha,
    Sose cine pe.
Uwabepa abifya,
Afutatila Lesa,
Lelo iwe shangila;
    Sose cine pe.

songs.title: MWE MFUMU, IFWE FWE BANA,
songs.content:
Mwe Mfumu, ifwe fwe bana,
    Natwisa tumwimbile;
Mwe bam aka, mwaliwama,
    Ne fwe tumucindike.
Tubike mitima yesu
    Pali Yesu ‘ko ali;
Twilatemwa nangu cimo
    Icimulenge nsoni.

‘Mfumu yamona kwi sano
    Ifya bana bacita;
Ilelemba ne milimo
    Ne fyaba mu mitima.
Mutusambe tube tutu,
    Tutine ifya bubi;
Mutwenshe mu nshila yenu,
    Tufike uko muli.

songs.title: ‘BA KWA LESA BAFUMINE
songs.content:
‘Ba kwa Lesa bafumine
    Mu Egupti mu busha,
Baile pamo na bana,
    Balelola pasuma;
         Aba bana
    Baleenda ku mpanga.

Bayabwike na Yordani,
    Bafika ku kanani,
Baikele umutende,
    Ne fisuma bamwene.
         Aba bana
    Inyimbo batotele.

Mwe Katula, ne fwe tube
    Abalendo nga balya;
Imwe mwalitulubula
    Ku fibi na ku ciwa.
         Nomba ne fwe
    Twende ne mwe mu mpanga.

Yesu, mutuntungulule,
    Mucinge ku kasuba;
E lye mfifi nga yapona,
    Mubutishe inshila;
         Mututule
    Kuli fyonse fyabipa.

Nga twafika ku mumana
    Wa kutinya wa mfifi
Mube na ifwe mu menshi,
    Mutwabusho mutende;
         Mutandule
    Umwenso wesu onse.

Ilyo lwendo lwesu lwapwa,
    Tukakamona pasuma;
Tukekala na bashila,
    Abana ba mu ng'anda;
         Fwe bashuka,
    Tukalatasha Lesa.

songs.title: ULIKO MUSUMBA,
songs.content:
Uliko musumba,
   Usuma ku mulu;
Takuli cintu ca kukowesha
   Icingafikako.

Katula ninjisa,
   No kumupapata,
‘Kuti munsambe, ‘kuti munsambe
   Ku fyabipa fyandi.

Kristu ndefwaisha
   ‘Kubo mwana wenu;
Munsunge bwino
   Pa kuluba kwandi.

‘Kuti njikaleko
   Ku mulu na imwe;
‘Kubuta tutu, ‘kubuta tutu,
   Mu calo ca luse.

songs.title: CILIKO CALO CISUMA,
songs.content:
Ciliko calo cisuma,
    Cabuta! Cabuta!
Uko takwaba fyabipa,
    Cabuta! Cabuta!
Baleimbako inyimbo,
Bantu basuma babako,
Ne filimba balishako,
    Cabuta! Cabuta!

Kulyu kushili makumbi!
    Ca nseko! Ca nseko!
Nelye filamba takuli,
    Ca nseko! ca nseko!
Balenwa menshi ya bumi
Pa cinso ca Mupusushi;
Ulubuto e ko luli,
    Ca nseko! Ca nseko!

Pantu tuli ababipa,
    Afwile! afwile!
Pantu tatuli mutende
    Afwile! afwile!
Tusambwe ku fibi fyonse,
No kupelwa umutende,
‘Kuti twikale nankwe pe;
    Afwile! afwile!

songs.title: KWABE CALO UKO,
songs.content:
Kwabe calo uko,
   Icawama,
Ukwa basumina
   Baikala.
Baleimbila pe
‘Mfumu yesu Katula,
Baleikatisha,
Balelumbanisha,
   ‘Mfumu ya pe.

Tuye ku calwe ci,
   Twende bonse;
Mwiiminina fye,
   Tuye pamo,
Tukalasekela
‘Lyo ‘malanda yakapwa,
‘Kwikala ne Mfumu
Mu calo ca mulu,
   Kushuka pe.

Ku calwe ci cine
   Tukafika,
Shifwa katusunga,
   Atemwa pe.
Kuli ululumbi,
Kulya kwaliwamisha,
Kwabuta, kwabuta,
Kushili bulanda,
   Atemwa pe.

songs.title: ‘MFUMU YA MULU NA PA NSHI,
songs.content:
‘Mfumu ya mulu na pa nshi,
Kuli ‘mwe kubyo lulumbi,
Tulangyo kutemwa shani
    Kuli imwe?

Twaikala no mutende,
Pantwi fisuma twapelwa,
Kuli imwe twatotela,
    Mwatupa fye.

‘Mwana wenu umo wine,
Mwabike lambo lya cine,
No luse lwafula lwine
    Mwatupa fye.

Umupashi wa Mushilo,
‘Maka no mweo no luse,
Aishilyo kuba ni few,
    Mwatupa fye.

‘Bantwa bengi balubulwa,
‘Mpulumushi shaelelwa,
Ba Shifwe twamutotela,
    Mwatupa fye.

Twatotela kuli imwe,
‘Mweo, ‘mutende na fyonse;
Twikalilile nenu pe
    Mwatupa fye.

songs.title: NOMBA PA KWINGILA
songs.content:
Nomba pa kwingila
    Mu mwaka upya,
Tuleumfwe shiwi,
    Twasansamuka.
‘Shiwilya kwa Shifwe
    Lyatepelesha;
Lyatupela maka,
    Lyatusekesha.

    Twende no kushipa,
         ‘Bana ba Mfumu,
    Pantwi shiwi lyakwe
         Lyabelelela.

“Ne Lesa ndi ne mwe,
    ‘Fyo nasosele;
Nakulamwafwa pe,
    Te ‘ti mutine.
Ine ndemubaka,
    ‘Kuboko kwandi
Kukamwiminika
    Ku cinso candi.”

‘Mwako uletampa,
    Mu luse lwakwe
Bonse bakamona
    ‘Fya bupe fyakwe.
‘Babi na balanda,
    ‘Balwele pamo,
‘Kuli aba bonse
    Kulyu bupalo.

Te ‘ti atubele,
    Nangu kutusha,
Pantu alaile
    ‘Kuba na ifwe.
Tumucetekele
    ‘Mwako no wine,
Lesa ali ne fwe
    ‘Nshiku shonse pe.

songs.title: UMWAKA UMBI WAPITA,
songs.content:
Umwaka umbi wapita,
    Lubilo lubilo;
Twaise lelo kupepa
    No kwimba ulwimbo.

         Twaisa . . . twaisa . . .
         Twaisamucelela,
         Twaisa . . . twaisa . . .
         Twaisa no lwimbo.

Twaisalumbanya Yesu
    No kwimbilo luse,
Lwa uletwita ku mulu,
    E utubaka pe.

Twalumbanishe ca bupe
    Ca mwako yu wapwa,
Twaimbe layano lyakwe
    No kusanshikisha.

Yatote mitima Yesu
    Umwaka naupwa,
Twacetekela mwe Yesu
    Pali uno upya.

songs.title: TULIMA NO KUTANDA
songs.content:
Tulima no kutanda
    Imbuto shisuma;
Lelo icishimesha
    Maka ya kwa Lesa.
E utupele mfula
    ‘Kunasho mushily,
Atuma na kasuba
    ‘Kuti filyo fipye.

         Fyonse ifisuma
              Fyafuma ku mulu.
         Mutotele, mutotele,
              Pa luse lwakwo lu.

Eka fye ni Kabumba
    Wa fintu fisuma,
Awamya amaluba,
    No kubeshe ntanda.
Yamumfwa amabimbi
    Utuni alela;
Lelo kucila ni ‘few
    Fya kulya atupa.

Mwe Shifwe twatotela
    Pa fisuma ifyo;
‘Kutanda no kusepa,
    ‘Bumi, ‘maka, ‘filyo.
Tatwakwata fya bupe,
    Fyonse fili fyenu;
Mulefwaye ca bupe
    Ca mutima yesu.

songs.title: ABAFWA BASHUKA,
songs.content:
Abafwa bashuka,
   Nga bali kwa Yesu;
Balalike mitwe
   Pa cifuba cakwe.

Kulya kwawamisha,
   ‘Mfifi tayabako;
Ni Yesu bamona,
   Bamutemwa uko.

Ifyabacushishe
   Fya muno mu calo,
Nomba fyapwa fyonse,
   Tafibacusha ‘yo.

Kacema musuma
   Atungululako,
‘Kushili bulanda,
   Kuli fye inseko.

Tuli ne filamba,
   Fwe bashiwa pano,
Twabaloshe cibi,
   No kubafuluka.

‘Shiwi lya munensu
   Twatemenwe cibi;
Nomba tatumfwa ‘yo
   Fyatalala fyonse.

Munensu we, waya,
   Twalikutemwisha;
Twakulila nomba-
   Yesu alilile.

Bwangu bukesaca,
   Yesu tukamumfwa,
Kuli ‘fwe akati:
   “Bukeni no kwanga.”

songs.title: PA BANTU ABAFWILE KALE,
songs.content:
Pa bantu abafwile kale,
Abatusha ku milimo yabo,
‘Shina lyenu litotelwe, Mfumu:
     Aleluya! Aleluya!

Mwe Cilibwe, Linga, no Bulamba,
Mwali Mushika wabo mu mfifi.
Mwali Lubuto lwabo mu mfifi.

‘Fita fyenu ‘fya cine no kushipa,
Filwe nga balelwa aba kale;
Bakafwikwe citebo ca mweo.

Bulwi bwakosa, tabulepwa bwangu,
Lelo lwimbo lwa kwansha tulomfwa,
Nomba ne fwe twamwenamwa maka.

‘Kasuba kawa ne mfifi yaisa,
‘Fita fyasukwa fitusha fyonse,
Kwa Lesa kwabo mutende wa pe.

Bwaco bushiku bumbi bwa lulumbi,
‘Bwa kwimamo abashilishiwa,
Ne Mfumu Kristu naimoneka.

Ku mpela sha fyalo ne sha fimana,
Kwaisa makana ya ba kwimba,
Kuli Wishi, Mwane, no Mupashi.

songs.title: WE MUNE, IFYO WAELELWE FIBI,
songs.content:
We mune, ifyo waelelwe fibi,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako;
No mo waishile ku watanikwe,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.
Bushe nomba uleenda bwino?
Bushe nomba wabuta tutu!
Bushe Shikulu e buseko bobe?
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.

         Utwebeko twapapata,
         Utwebeko kabili.
         Utwebe fyo wapusuka,
         Cilekukosha mu nshila;

Bushe Yesu alekwafwa mu nshila?
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.
Bushe akwitaka na ku kuboko?
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.
Awe takwaba Mpalume ya cine.
Yesu e Mpalume ya cine.
Kanshi calingo kuti bonse bomfwe
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.

Awe ili lyashi lyaliwamisha,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako;
Lyacile filoto fisuma nga nshi,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.
Kuli bamo bulanda bwacila,
Bafilwo kumono mutende;
Kanshi ubalandile fya kwa Yesu,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.

Ifyo walwisho mulwani no kwansha,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako;
Cilekosho bwa busumina nomba,
    Twapapata mune uletwebako;
Tulelwa ne fita fya kwa Satan,
Limbi tukateka na Kristu;
Kanshi tufishe bambi kuli Yesu;
    Twapapata mune uletwebako.

songs.title: NAKUTEMWISHA WE MFUMU,
songs.title2: I KNOW I LOVE THEE BETTER LORD
songs.content:
Nakutemwisha we Mfumu,
    Ukucila fyonse;
Fintu wampelyo mutende,
    Ushakaputulwe.

         Napapa cine napapa,
         Ukutemwa kwakwe;
         Kuti nafilwo kulanda
         Ifyo antemwisha.

Ninjishibo li mupepi,
    Mweka mu mutima;
Na pa kutontonkanye ci,
    ‘Mutima wayanga.

Wambikilemo buseko,
    E co ndasekela;
‘Pabulo kutemwa kobe,
    Ye! Kuti nafitwa.

We Mfumu, Katula wandi,
    Nga cabe fi nomba,
Batini cikaba shani
    ‘Lyo tukamonana?

songs.title: YESU ALIIMA MU MFWA MWINE,
songs.content:
Yesu aliima mu mfwa mwine,
    Atupingwililwe pa lupanda;
Aliima, ifwe natubinga,
    Atusangulwile no mulopa.

Yesu aliima mu mfwa mwine,
    Ne fwe twaimine pamo nankwe;
Aliima, ‘cilye nacipita,
    Muli wene tuli fyo mutende.

Yesu aliima mu mfwa mwine,
    Natutulwa no mulopa wakwe;
Aliima, mwa Lesa e mwesu,
    Imitima ili uko kwine.

Yesu aliima mu mfwa mwine,
    Natangila, ne fwe tulekonka;
Aliima, twatotele Mfumu,
    Nutwanshishe mfwa, watulubwile.

songs.title: INE NAKUCETEKELA,
songs.title2: I AM TRUSTING THEE, LORD JESUS
songs.content:
Ine nakucetekela,
    We Mfumu yandi;
Walimweno bupususho,
    ‘Bupe no luse.

         Ncetekela, iwe weka fye,
              Ncetekela, cine, iwe weka fye.

Ine nakucetekela,
    Kuti njelelwe;
Umufushisho luse lobe,
    Nakupapata.

Ine nakucetekela,
    We wamfwilile;
Nsangululwe no mulopa
    Wa ku Kalbale.

Ine nakucetekela,
    Mpelakwa maka;
‘Mafunde yantu ulempa
    Yakulankosha

Ine nakucetekela,
    Wilandeka ngwe;
Nakucetekela pe fye,
    Mfumu ya fyonse.

songs.title: WE BUSHE UKEKALA PI?
songs.content:
We bushe ukekala pi?
    Ili lipusho lyalyafya,
Njeba mune napapata,
    We bushe ukekala pi?

         Njeba mune napapata,
              We bushe ukekala pi?

Bamo balesala Kristu,
    No kuleke fibi fyabo:
Mu mulu mukaba mwabo.
    We bushe ukekala pi?

Bambi balesulo mweo,
    Baleya ku bonaushi;
Kulya ‘ba cikaba shani?
    We bushe ukekala pi?

We shi sala Kristu nomba,
    Cetekelo luse lwakwe;
E lyo uleisosela,
    “Ine nkekala mwa Lesa.”

         Nkekalamo, nkekalamo,
         Ine nkekala mwa Lesa.

songs.title: MU MABOKO YA KWA LESA, NDYU MUTENDE;
songs.title2: GOD'S ALMIGHTY ARMS ARE ROUND ME
songs.content:
Mu maboko ya kwa Lesa, ndyu mutende;
‘Cilye te kuti cimpafye, ndyu mutende.
Yesu e wampingwililwe,
Amfwilile, andubwile,
Ne muntungwa ndasekela, ndyu mutende.

‘Cipupu nelyo cacila, ndyu mutende.
Awe te ti nkungumane, ndyu mutende
‘Bulwi nelyo bwise fimbi,
Ine te ‘ti ndekyo kwimba,
Yesu talendekelesha, ndyu mutende.

Mu kweshiwa apalama, ndyu mutende,
‘Kufunda kwakwe kwayana, ndyu mutende;
Limo limo alencusha,
Natotela ninjishiba,
Afwaya fyo kugwamisha, ndyu mutende.

Lyonse ilyo nashibuka, ndyu mutende,
No bushiku nga bwaila, ndyu mutende,
Awe te ‘ti ntine fya mfwa,
Yesu mwine alendama,
Ne lintu nketwa ku mwakwe, ndyu mutende.

songs.title: PA KUPWA KWA MILIMO NO KWABUKO MUMANA,
songs.title2: WHEN MY LIFE WORK IS ENDED
songs.content:
Pa kupwa kwa milimo no kwabuko mumana,
Ilyo bukaca ubwa kusekela;
Nkeshibo Mulubushi pa kufika kwi shilya,
E ukabalilo kunsekelela.

       Nkamwishiba, nkamwishiba,
       ‘Lyo nkamumona ne wakulwa;
       Nkamwishiba, nkamwishiba,
       Ku mikofu mu ndupi shakwe.

Kukaba ubuseko pa kumumono Mwine,
Uwa mpumi yawamisha yayemba;
Nkalatasho kutemwa ne cikuku cikulu
Icanungikile ncende yawama.

Abaneswa bengi balesekela mwa Lesa,
Ndebukukishe fyo kale twalekene;
Tukayakumanako ne nyimbo sha buseko,
Lelo kucila nafuluka Yesu.

Nkafwikwa ne fyabuta pa kwingila mwa Lesa,
Mwene tamwakabe ifya bulanda;
Mu lwimbo lwa kutota ine nkasanshikisha,
Cacila nkamona Yesu Katula.

songs.title: YESU KATULA ALUMBANIWE,
songs.title2: PRAISE TO JESUS, HIS MERCY IS FREE
songs.content:
Yesu Katula alumbaniwe,
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
We mubi, Yesu alekutula,
    E wa luse lwafula!
Shi wingasumina akupale,
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
No mweo w ape alekupele,
    E wa luse lwafula!

    Yesu Katula atekufwaya,
    Alefwaya no kufwaya;
    Mu kutemwa kwakwe alekwita,
    Akufwaya no kwita.

Ni pa cishi wasulila Yesu?
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
Yesu aleti, “Wise, kuli ‘ne”,
    E wa luse lwafula!
Leko bubi, sh’isa wikokola,
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
Yesu alekupususha nomba,
    E wa luse lwafula!

Tontonkanya pa kutemwa kwakwe,
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
Afwilyo kuti upusushiwe,
    E wa luse lwafula!
Lapila, wipele kuli wene,
    E wa luse, e wa luse!
Umunakile, alekukosha,
    E wa luse lwafula!

songs.title: MU LWIMBO LWA KUTOTELA,
songs.title2: NOW IN A SONG OF GRATEFUL PRAISE
songs.content:
Mu lwimbo lwa kutotela,
Ndesanshikisha ku Mfumu,
Ndeimba na bwa bashila:
     “Yesu fyonse aliwamya.”

     No kucila fyonse ndetila,
     “Yesu fyonse aliwamya.”

Ine napapa sana fye,
Ukutemwa kwakwe kwine;
Angapwile mu mulilo;
     “Yesu fyonse aliwamya.”

Katunka alicenjela,
Ilingi fye alampamfya;
Lelo ine ndatila fye:
     “Yesu fyonse aliwamya.”

Ilintu nkafika mwakwe,
‘Lwimbo lwandi lumo lwine,
E lwimbo lwa kutotela:
     “Yesu  fyonse aliwamya.”

songs.title: ‘LYO YESU AKESATULAMBULA,
songs.content:
‘Lyo Yesu akesatulambula,
    Akamoneka bwangu;
Bushe tuli ba kumulolela,
    Na mafuta mu nyali?

    Bushe tuleti, “Natwiteyanya
    Pa kwingila mwa Lesa?”
    Bushe akatusanga tuli fye,
    Ilyo ‘Mfumu yesu ikesa?

Nga ‘katwita pa lucelocelo,
    ‘Fwe bonse umo umo;
Pa kumubwesesha matalanta,
    Bushe akatutasha?

Bane, muli ‘fi fintu twashilwa,
    Bushe tucita bwino?
Mu mutima nga tamwaba kantu,
    Tukatusha fye uko.

Bashuka ‘bakasangwa bali fye,
    Bakasekela nankwe:
Nelyo akesa pa kashita nshi,
    Bushe natwiteyanya!

songs.title: ‘MYAKA INGI NAPOSELE FYE,
songs.content:
‘Myaka ingi naposele fye,
Nasulile uwatanikwe,
Nshaishibe fyo amfwilile,
    Ku Kalbale.

         Bwingi bwa cikuu no luse;
         Alipashile fibi fyandi.
         E ko ne musha nalubwilwe,
              Ku Kalbale.

Ilyo Lessa’nshininyo bubi,
E lintu mwenso wanjikete;
Nasuka napilibukila
    Ku Kalbale.

Awe nomba ndi wa kwa Yesu,
Ba o nomba ni Mfumu yandi;
Nombe nshiku shonse ndeimbe
    Fya Kalbale.

E bupususho bwa kutasha,
    Bwaletelwe no luse lwakwe;
Wene ifyo atufikile
    Ku Kalbale.

songs.title: MU MPANGA YA KWA LESA,
songs.title2: IN THE LAND OF FADELESS DAY
songs.content:
Mu mpanga ya kwa Lesa,
    Mu musumba ulya,
Tukalabelela pe,
    ‘Bushiku takwaba.

         Ne filamba no mwenso,
         Nelye mfwa ne misongo,
         Tamalepende myaka,
         ‘Bushiku takwaba.

‘Mpongolo shabekesha.
    Mu musumba ulya,
Pa nshi pa nsahabu,
    ‘Bushiku takwaba.

'Mpongolo tashisalwa,
     Mu musumba ulya,
'Mumana uleya pe,
    'Bushiku takwaba.
Tabafwaya kasuba,
    Mu musumba ulya,
Pantu Yesu Lubuto,
    ‘Bushiku takwaba.

songs.title: WE NSHITA YA MAPEPO WE,
songs.content:
We nshita ya mapepo we,
Watwita kuli baShifwe,
Ukuti tusokolole
Fyonse ifiletupamfya
Pa kwitaba ku bwityo bu
Twapusuka ku matunko,
Na Satana atufilwa
Pa kwise nshita ye pepo.

We nshita ya mapepo we,
Tulekulolela cine,
Pamo na banensu bonse
Abatemwisho kupepa.
Twayako bwangu ne nsansa
Ku cifulo icasontwa
‘Kukumana na Katula
Pa kwise nshita ya pepo.

We nshita ya mapepo we,
Watwala malombo yesu
Ku wa cishinka ni cine
Uwatemwo kutupala.
E watwebo kumufwaya,
Cine twamucetekela;
Atusendela macushi,
Pa kwise nshita ye pepo.

songs.title: MWE LESA WANDI, NGA NALOLEKESHA
songs.content:
Mwe Lesa wandi, nga nalolekesha
Ifintu fyonse ‘fyo mwabumbile;
Namone ntanda, ne nkuba naumfwa-
Maka yenu yalangwa konse fye.

    Kamwimbile, Lesa Mupusushi,
    Mwe bakulu, mwe bakulu!
    Kamwimbile, Lesa Mupusushi,
    Mwe bakulu, mwe bakulu!

Nga natandala mu mutengo ‘kulu,
Naumfwo tuni tulelilamo;
Nanino lupili ulwalepesha,
No kuloleshe mpanga isuma.

Ilyo naibukisha ifyo Lesa
Atumine Mwanya tufwilile;
Atusendele membu shesu shonse-
Awe ici campapusha cine.

Ilyo Kristu akesa mu makumbi,
No kuntwala ku mwakwe ku mulu;
Buseko mwe! Nkalatasha Kabumba,
Nati, Mwe Lesa, muli bakuku!

songs.title: PALYA PA KALBALE
songs.content:
Palya pa Kalbale
Palipo lupanda,
Uko Yesu atufwilile.
Alitusendele
Amabifyo yonse
‘Kuti atupusushe bonse.

    Tukatakishisho lupanda
    Nshiku shonse sham yeo yesu,
    Tukatakishisho lupanda,
    No kwimbilo luse lwa Mfumu.

Palya pa Kalbale
Bamutanikile,
Mwana wa Mpanga wa kwa Lesa.
Umubili wakwe
Watufunikile
No mulopa watusumine.

Palya pa Kalbale
Yesu acimfishe
Ifilwani fya maka fyonse.
Atile, “Nacipwa,”
Aimine ku mfwa,
Ni Mfumu ya shamfumu shonse.

songs.title: KULI LESA TULETOTA,
songs.title2: PRAISE GOD FROM WHOM ALL BLESSINGS FLOW
songs.content:
Kuli Lesa tuletota,
Ifintu fyonse atupa;
Toteni bonse mu mulu,
Wishi, Mwane, no Mupashi.
